import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { CheckListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalCheckListPlugin'
import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
import { HistoryPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalHistoryPlugin'
import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
import { TabIndentationPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalTabIndentationPlugin'
import { TablePlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalTablePlugin'

import { allEditNodes } from '../config-edit'
import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
import { setResolvedEditNodes } from '../node-registry'
import { AlertPlugin } from '../plugins/AlertPlugin'
import { AutoFocusPlugin } from '../plugins/AutoFocusPlugin'
import { AutoLinkPlugin } from '../plugins/AutoLinkPlugin'
import { EditorRefPlugin } from '../plugins/EditorRefPlugin'
import { FootnotePlugin } from '../plugins/FootnotePlugin'
import { HorizontalRulePlugin } from '../plugins/HorizontalRulePlugin'
import { ImagePlugin } from '../plugins/ImagePlugin'
import { KaTeXPlugin } from '../plugins/KaTeXPlugin'
import { MarkdownShortcutsPlugin } from '../plugins/MarkdownShortcutsPlugin'
import { MermaidPlugin } from '../plugins/MermaidPlugin'
import { OnChangePlugin } from '../plugins/OnChangePlugin'
import { SubmitShortcutPlugin } from '../plugins/SubmitShortcutPlugin'
import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
import type { RichEditorProps } from '../types'
import { ContentEditable } from './ContentEditable'
import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'

export function RichEditor({
  initialValue,
  onChange,
  variant = 'article',
  theme = 'light',
  placeholder = 'Write something...',
  onSubmit,
  autoFocus = false,
  className,
  contentClassName,
  style,
  actions,
  onEditorReady,
  extraNodes,
  rendererConfig,
  debounceMs,
  children,
}: RichEditorProps) {
  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allEditNodes, ...extraNodes] : allEditNodes
  setResolvedEditNodes(nodes)
  const initialConfig = {
    namespace: 'RichEditor',
    theme: editorTheme,
    nodes,
    editable: true,
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[RichEditor]', error)
    },
    ...(initialValue ? { editorState: JSON.stringify(initialValue) } : {}),
  }

  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)

  return (
    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
        <RendererConfigProvider
          config={rendererConfig}
          mode="editor"
          variant={variant}
        >
          <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
            <FootnotePlugin>
              <div
                className={clsx('rich-editor', variantClass, className)}
                style={style}
                data-theme={theme}
              >
                <RichTextPlugin
                  contentEditable={
                    <ContentEditable
                      className={contentClassName}
                      placeholder={placeholder}
                    />
                  }
                  ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
                />
                <HistoryPlugin />
                <ListPlugin />
                <LinkPlugin />
                <TabIndentationPlugin />
                <TablePlugin />
                <MarkdownShortcutsPlugin />
                <OnChangePlugin onChange={onChange} debounceMs={debounceMs} />
                <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />
                <ImagePlugin />
                <KaTeXPlugin />
                <AlertPlugin />
                <MermaidPlugin />
                <HorizontalRulePlugin />
                <CheckListPlugin />
                <AutoLinkPlugin />
                <EditorRefPlugin onEditorReady={onEditorReady} />
                {autoFocus && <AutoFocusPlugin />}
                {children}
                {actions && (
                  <div className="rich-editor__actions">{actions}</div>
                )}
              </div>
            </FootnotePlugin>
          </LexicalComposer>
        </RendererConfigProvider>
      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    </PortalThemeProvider>
  )
}
---
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'

import { allEditNodes } from './config-edit'

let _resolvedEditNodes: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>> | null = null

export function setResolvedEditNodes(nodes: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>): void {
  _resolvedEditNodes = nodes
}

export function getResolvedEditNodes(): Array<Klass<LexicalNode>> {
  return _resolvedEditNodes ?? allEditNodes
}

import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER } from './container'
import { FOOTNOTE_SECTION_TRANSFORMER, FOOTNOTE_TRANSFORMER } from './footnote'

import { KATEX_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER, KATEX_INLINE_TRANSFORMER } from './katex'

import {
  CODE_BLOCK_NODE_TRANSFORMER,
  GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
  HORIZONTAL_RULE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
  IMAGE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,

import {

} from './superscript-subscript'

export const ALL_TRANSFORMERS = [

  MENTION_TRANSFORMER,
  FOOTNOTE_TRANSFORMER,
  INSERT_TRANSFORMER,
  SUPERSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER,
  SUBSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER,
  KATEX_INLINE_TRANSFORMER,
  // Block transformers (order matters - more specific first)
  FOOTNOTE_SECTION_TRANSFORMER,
  CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER,

  CHECK_LIST,
  KATEX_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,

  TABLE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,

]

export { GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER } from './alert'
export { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER } from './container'

import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
import { useEffect } from 'react'

import type { AlertType } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
import { $createAlertQuoteNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'

export const INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND = createCommand<AlertType>('INSERT_ALERT')

export function AlertPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()

  useEffect(() => {
    return editor.registerCommand(
      INSERT_ALERT_COMMAND,
      (alertType) => {
        $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)])
        return true
      },
      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    )
  }, [editor])

  return null
}

import { PortalThemeWrapper } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import {
  LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin,
  useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch,
} from '@lexical/react/LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin'
import type { LexicalEditor, TextNode } from 'lexical'
import { $getSelection, $isRangeSelection } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'

import { getBuiltinItems } from './builtinItems'
import type { SlashMenuItem } from './SlashMenuItem'
import { SlashMenuItem as SlashMenuItemClass } from './SlashMenuItem'
import { SlashMenuList } from './SlashMenuList'

export interface SlashMenuPluginProps {
  items?: SlashMenuItem[]
  extraItems?: SlashMenuItem[]
  triggerChar?: string
}

interface SlashMenuItemConfig {
  title: string
  icon?: ReactNode
  description?: string
  keywords?: string[]
  section?: string
  onSelect: (editor: LexicalEditor, queryString: string) => void
}

export function collectNodeSlashItems(editor: LexicalEditor): SlashMenuItem[] {
  const items: SlashMenuItem[] = []
  const nodes: Map<string, { klass: any }> = (editor as any)._nodes
  for (const { klass } of nodes.values()) {
    const configs: SlashMenuItemConfig[] | undefined = klass.slashMenuItems
    if (configs) {
      for (const config of configs) {
        items.push(new SlashMenuItemClass(config.title, config))
      }
    }
  }
  return items
}

function filterItems(query: string, items: SlashMenuItem[]): SlashMenuItem[] {
  if (!query) return items
  const lower = query.toLowerCase()
  return items.filter((item) => {
    if (item.title.toLowerCase().includes(lower)) return true
    return item.keywords.some((kw) => kw.toLowerCase().includes(lower))
  })
}

export function SlashMenuPlugin({
  items,
  extraItems,
  triggerChar = '/',
}: SlashMenuPluginProps) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const [queryString, setQueryString] = useState<string | null>(null)

  const allItems = useMemo(() => {
    if (items) return items
    const builtins = getBuiltinItems()
    const nodeItems = collectNodeSlashItems(editor)
    const combined = [...builtins, ...nodeItems]
    return extraItems ? [...combined, ...extraItems] : combined
  }, [items, extraItems, editor])

  const filteredItems = useMemo(
    () => filterItems(queryString ?? '', allItems),
    [queryString, allItems],
  )

  const checkForTriggerMatch = useBasicTypeaheadTriggerMatch(triggerChar, {
    minLength: 0,
  })

  const onSelectOption = useCallback(
    (
      option: SlashMenuItem,
      textNodeContainingQuery: TextNode | null,
      closeMenu: () => void,
      matchingString: string,
    ) => {
      editor.update(() => {
        if (textNodeContainingQuery) {
          const selection = $getSelection()
          if ($isRangeSelection(selection)) {
            textNodeContainingQuery.remove()
          }
        }
      })
      closeMenu()
      option.onSelect(editor, matchingString)
    },
    [editor],
  )

  return (
    <LexicalTypeaheadMenuPlugin<SlashMenuItem>
      onQueryChange={setQueryString}
      onSelectOption={onSelectOption}
      triggerFn={checkForTriggerMatch}
      options={filteredItems}
      menuRenderFn={(
        anchorElementRef,
        { selectedIndex, selectOptionAndCleanUp, setHighlightedIndex },
      ) => {
        if (!anchorElementRef.current || filteredItems.length === 0) {
          return null
        }
        return createPortal(
          <PortalThemeWrapper>
            <SlashMenuList
              options={filteredItems}
              selectedIndex={selectedIndex}
              selectOptionAndCleanUp={selectOptionAndCleanUp}
              setHighlightedIndex={setHighlightedIndex}
            />
          </PortalThemeWrapper>,
          anchorElementRef.current,
        )
      }}
    />
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import { Code } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { CodeBlockRenderer } from '../components/renderers/CodeBlockRenderer'
import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'

export type SerializedCodeBlockNode = Spread<
  {
    code: string
    language: string
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export class CodeBlockNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __code: string
  __language: string

  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Code Block',
      icon: createElement(Code, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Syntax-highlighted code',
      keywords: ['code', 'snippet', 'codeblock'],
      section: 'MEDIA',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createCodeBlockNode('', 'text')])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static getType(): string {
    return 'code-block'
  }

  static clone(node: CodeBlockNode): CodeBlockNode {
    return new CodeBlockNode(node.__code, node.__language, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(code: string, language: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__code = code
    this.__language = language
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = 'rich-code-block-wrapper'
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedCodeBlockNode): CodeBlockNode {
    return $createCodeBlockNode(serializedNode.code, serializedNode.language)
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedCodeBlockNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'code-block',
      code: this.__code,
      language: this.__language,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  getCode(): string {
    return this.__code
  }

  setCode(code: string): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__code = code
  }

  getLanguage(): string {
    return this.__language
  }

  setLanguage(language: string): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__language = language
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createRendererDecoration('CodeBlock', CodeBlockRenderer, {
      code: this.__code,
      language: this.__language,
    })
  }
}

export function $createCodeBlockNode(
  code: string,
  language: string,
): CodeBlockNode {
  return new CodeBlockNode(code, language)
}

export function $isCodeBlockNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is CodeBlockNode {
  return node instanceof CodeBlockNode
}
---
import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { CodeBlockEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/CodeBlockEditDecorator'
import { CodeBlockNode, type SerializedCodeBlockNode } from './CodeBlockNode'

export class CodeBlockEditNode extends CodeBlockNode {
  static clone(node: CodeBlockEditNode): CodeBlockEditNode {
    return new CodeBlockEditNode(node.__code, node.__language, node.__key)
  }

  static importJSON(
    serializedNode: SerializedCodeBlockNode,
  ): CodeBlockEditNode {
    return new CodeBlockEditNode(serializedNode.code, serializedNode.language)
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createElement(CodeBlockEditDecorator, {
      nodeKey: this.__key,
      code: this.__code,
      language: this.__language,
    })
  }
}

     1	import {
     2	  TooltipContent,
     3	  TooltipRoot,
     4	  TooltipTrigger,
     5	} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     6	import type { HTMLAttributes, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     7	import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8	
     9	import {
    10	  useFootnoteContent,
    11	  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
    12	} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
    13	
    14	export interface FootnoteRendererProps {
    15	  identifier: string
    16	}
    17	
    18	export function FootnoteRenderer({ identifier }: FootnoteRendererProps) {
    19	  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
    20	  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)
    21	
    22	  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    23	  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    24	
    25	  const handleClick = useCallback(
    26	    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    27	      const target =
    28	        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
    29	        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
    30	      if (!target) return
    31	
    32	      e.preventDefault()
    33	      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    34	      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    35	
    36	      window.setTimeout(() => {
    37	        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    38	      }, 1200)
    39	    },
    40	    [identifier, targetId],
    41	  )
    42	
    43	  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier
    44	
    45	  return (
    46	    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
    47	      <TooltipRoot>
    48	        <TooltipTrigger
    49	          render={(props: HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>) => (
    50	            <a
    51	              {...props}
    52	              className="rich-footnote-ref"
    53	              href={`#${targetId}`}
    54	              id={referenceId}
    55	              role="doc-noteref"
    56	              aria-label={
    57	                content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
    58	              }
    59	              onClick={handleClick}
    60	              data-footnote-ref={identifier}
    61	            >
    62	              {label}
    63	            </a>
    64	          )}
    65	        />

     4	import { useFootnoteDefinitions } from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     5	
     6	export interface FootnoteSectionRendererProps {

    10	
    11	export function FootnoteSectionRenderer({
    12	  definitions,
    13	}: FootnoteSectionRendererProps) {
    14	  const { displayNumberMap } = useFootnoteDefinitions()
    15	
    16	  const sortedEntries = Object.entries(definitions).sort(
    17	    ([a], [b]) => (displayNumberMap[a] ?? 0) - (displayNumberMap[b] ?? 0),
    18	  )
    19	
    20	  if (sortedEntries.length === 0) return null
    21	
    22	  return (
    23	    <div className="rich-footnote-section-content" role="doc-endnotes">
    24	      <hr className="rich-footnote-section-divider" />
    25	      <ol className="rich-footnote-section-list">
    26	        {sortedEntries.map(([identifier, content]) => {
    27	          const displayNum = displayNumberMap[identifier] ?? identifier
    28	          return (
    29	            <FootnoteSectionItem
    30	              key={identifier}
    31	              identifier={identifier}
    32	              content={content}
    33	              displayNum={displayNum}
    34	            />
    35	          )
    36	        })}
    37	      </ol>
    38	    </div>
    39	  )
    40	}

    55	    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    56	      e.preventDefault()
    57	      const refElement = document.getElementById(refId)
    58	      if (!refElement) return
    59	      refElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    60	      refElement.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    61	      window.setTimeout(() => {
    62	        refElement.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    63	      }, 1200)
    64	    },
    65	    [refId],
    66	  )
    67	
    68	  return (
    69	    <li
    70	      id={targetId}
    71	      className="rich-footnote-section-item"

import type { RichEditorProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { BlockHandlePlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle'
import { FloatingToolbarPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar'
import { FloatingLinkEditorPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit'
import { SlashMenuPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu'
import {
  TableCellResizerPlugin,
  TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin,
} from '@haklex/rich-plugin-table'
import { galleryNodes, TldrawNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
import {
  codeSnippetEditNodes,
  ConvertToLinkCardAction,
  embedEditNodes,
  EmbedPlugin,
  enhancedEditRendererConfig,
  katexEditNodes,
  linkCardEditNodes,
  PasteLinkCardPlugin,
  TldrawPlugin,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawNode,
  ...embedEditNodes,
  ...linkCardEditNodes,
  ...katexEditNodes,
  ...galleryNodes,
  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
]

export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
  RichEditorProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
  actions?: ReactNode
  selfHostnames?: string[]
}

export function ShiroEditor({
  extraNodes,
  actions,
  children,
  selfHostnames,
  ...props
}: ShiroEditorProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  const renderLinkExtraActions = useCallback(
    ({
      url,
      linkKey,
      actionButtonClassName,
    }: {
      url: string
      linkKey: string
      actionButtonClassName: string
    }) => (
      <ConvertToLinkCardAction
        url={url}
        linkKey={linkKey}
        className={actionButtonClassName}
      />
    ),
    [],
  )

  return (
    <RichEditor
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
      actions={
        <>
          <SlashMenuPlugin />
          {actions}
        </>
      }
    >
      <BlockHandlePlugin />
      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
      <FloatingLinkEditorPlugin renderExtraActions={renderLinkExtraActions} />
      <TldrawPlugin />
      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
      <PasteLinkCardPlugin />
      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
      {children}
    </RichEditor>
  )
}
---

import type { RendererConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'

import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'

type PortalThemeContextType = {
  className: string
}

const PortalThemeContext = createContext<PortalThemeContextType>({
  className: '',
})

export function PortalThemeProvider({
  className,
  children,
}: {
  className: string
  children?: ReactNode
}) {
  return (
    <PortalThemeContext.Provider
      value={useMemo(() => ({ className }), [className])}
    >
      {children}
    </PortalThemeContext.Provider>
  )
}

export function usePortalTheme() {
  return use(PortalThemeContext)
}

export function PortalThemeWrapper({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  const { className } = usePortalTheme()
  if (!className) return children
  return (
    <div style={{ display: 'contents' }} className={className}>
      {children}
    </div>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

    14	import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    15	
    16	export function RichRenderer({
    17	  value,
    18	  variant = 'article',
    19	  theme = 'light',
    20	  className,
    21	  style,
    22	  as: Component = 'div',
    23	  rendererConfig,
    24	  extraNodes,
    25	}: RichRendererProps) {

    28	  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    29	
    30	  const initialConfig = {
    31	    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    32	    theme: editorTheme,
    33	    nodes,
    34	    editable: false,
    35	    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    36	    onError: (error: Error) => {
    37	      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
    38	    },
    39	  }
    40	
    41	  return (
    42	    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
    43	      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    44	        <RendererConfigProvider
    45	          config={rendererConfig}
    46	          mode="renderer"
    47	          variant={variant}
    48	        >
    49	          <Component
    50	            className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)}
    51	            style={style}
    52	            data-theme={theme}

    67	                <HeadingAnchorPlugin />
    68	              </FootnotePlugin>

    71	        </RendererConfigProvider>
    72	      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    73	    </PortalThemeProvider>

11:## Terminology: Static / Edit Split
13:The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.
19:| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
20:| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
21:| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
22:| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |
27:RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
28:├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config.ts)
29:├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
30:│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
34:**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.
36:**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.
42:| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (static) | `RichRenderer` |
43:| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit) | `RichEditor` |
45:| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |
82:Three entry points: `./` (all), `./editor` (RichEditor), `./renderer` (RichRenderer).
86:- `src/nodes/` — 18 custom `DecoratorNode` types (Image, CodeBlock, KaTeX, Mermaid, Tldraw, Alert, Gallery, LinkCard, Component, Tabs, Grid, Details, Banner, Spoiler, Mention, Footnote, TaskListItem, Video)
93:### Custom Node Pattern
95:All custom content nodes extend `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`:
98:class FooNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
102:export function $createFooNode(payload): FooNode
103:export function $isFooNode(node): node is FooNode
108:### Node: Edit / Render Split
110:Nodes with heavy edit UI (Popover, DropdownMenu, LexicalNestedComposer etc.) are split into two classes for tree-shaking:
112:| Base Node (render-only) | Edit Node (editor-only) | Edit Dependency |
114:| `CodeBlockNode` | `CodeBlockEditNode` | `CodeBlockEditDecorator` |
115:| `KaTeXBlockNode` | `KaTeXBlockEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
116:| `KaTeXInlineNode` | `KaTeXInlineEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
117:| `LinkCardNode` | `LinkCardEditNode` | `LinkCardEditDecorator` + Popover + lucide-react |
118:| `AlertQuoteNode` | `AlertQuoteEditNode` | `AlertEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |
122:**Edit node** extends base node, overrides `clone()` / `importJSON()` / `decorate()` to use the full edit decorator with heavy deps.
125:- `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` / `allNodes` (render-only, used by `RichRenderer`)
126:- `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, used by `RichEditor`)
128:**Adding a new node with edit UI**: Create base node with `RendererWrapper` in `decorate()`, then create `FooEditNode extends FooNode` overriding `decorate()` with edit decorator. Register base in `config.ts`, edit in `config-edit.ts`.
158:<RichEditor rendererConfig={...} />
176:### Renderer: Edit / Static Split
178:Renderer components with edit-only heavy deps are split into static and edit variants:
180:| Package | Static (display-only) | Edit (with edit UI) | Edit Dependency |
182:| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | `AlertEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
183:| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | `MermaidEditRenderer` | presentDialog (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
184:| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | `MentionEditRenderer` | Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) + lucide-react |
186:Packages without edit-specific heavy deps (`codeblock`, `image`, `video`, `gallery`, `linkcard`) do not need splitting.
190:- `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` — edit-only. `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichEditor`. Depends on `@haklex/rich-renderers` for `enhancedRendererConfig` spread. Also re-exports edit nodes (`embedEditNodes`, `tabsEditNodes`), plugins (`EmbedPlugin`, `TldrawPlugin`, `SlashMenuPlugin`), and slash-menu utilities.

[AlertPlugin.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/AlertPlugin.tsx:17), [AlertQuoteNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts:65), [BannerNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts:76), [GridContainerNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:54), [TldrawPlugin.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawPlugin.tsx:16), [TldrawNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts:41)  
建议：除了 transformer，统一把 command/slash menu 入口切到 `*EditNode` 工厂（或把 slash config 下沉到 EditNode）。

2. **High**：`Static renderer 禁止 @haklex/rich-editor-ui` 在 footnote 上仍违规，且你的计划未覆盖。`FootnoteNode` 在 SSR 仍会走该 renderer。  
[FootnoteRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer.tsx:1), [FootnoteNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/FootnoteNode.ts:74), [rich-renderers config](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderers/src/config.ts:13)  
建议：给 Footnote/FootnoteSection 做 static/edit split，或至少提供 SSR-safe 默认实现并在 static config 覆盖。

3. **High**：你定义了“Static 路径无运行时分支”，但 `GalleryNode` 仍按 `editor.isEditable()` 分支，和约束冲突。  
[GalleryNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts:123)  
建议：要么显式放宽该约束（允许 isomorphic node 分支），要么补 `GalleryEditNode` 拆分。

4. **Medium**：`@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` 的样式与依赖仍是“编辑器全集”，SSR 入口若复用会把 edit-only 资源一起带上。  
[style.css](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/style.css:2), [package.json](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/package.json:22)  
建议：新增 `./style-ssr.css`（仅 renderer/static 相关），并给 `./ssr` 入口单独依赖边界。

5. **Medium**：`./styles` 入口目标是“零 Lexical”，但当前 `styles/index.ts` 仍导出 `editorTheme`（来自 lexical 类型）。你方案里“新建 styles-entry.ts + 改 styles/index.ts”这两条互相打架。  
[styles/index.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/index.ts:9), [theme.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/theme.ts:1)  
建议：`./styles` 用独立 entry，只导出 class/vars/getVariantClass；`editorTheme` 留在 `./static`。

6. **Medium**：验证脚本有漏检，会给出假阳性 PASS。你只扫 `rich-renderer-*`/`rich-ext-*`，没扫 `rich-editor` 内置 static renderers（footnote 正在违规）。

建议：把 `packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers` 纳入 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 禁止检查。

7. **Medium**：Tldraw split 后，编辑器集成点也要切换到 edit node；当前 `ShiroEditor` 仍注入 `TldrawNode`。  
[ShiroEditor.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx:11), [ShiroEditor.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx:27)

_**User (2026-02-25 12:20:27Z)**_

review: RichSSRRenderer 实施计划

 Context

 RichRenderer SSR 输出空壳。本计划收紧 Static/Edit 双轨定义，使 Static 路径 100% SSR 安全（无 LexicalNestedComposer、无浏览器
 API、无运行时分支），然后基于此构建 @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer headless 引擎。

 ---
 核心约束

 Static Node 定义

 1. 只存可序列化数据（SerializedEditorState / 基本类型），不持有 LexicalEditor 实例
 2. 无 getContentEditor() / getCellEditors() 方法
 3. decorate() 返回 SSR-safe 组件（StaticDecorator / RendererWrapper），无 editor.isEditable() 分支
 4. 无 static slashMenuItems（slash menu 下沉到 EditNode）

 Static Renderer 定义（两层）

 ┌────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │    类别    │                 约束                 │                                     例                                     │
 ├────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │            │ 零浏览器 API、零                     │                                                                            │
 │ SSR-Core   │ @haklex/rich-editor-ui、零           │ AlertRenderer、BannerRenderer、ImageRenderer、FootnoteStaticRenderer（新） │
 │            │ lucide-react                         │                                                                            │
 ├────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │            │ 首次 render 有意义 HTML；浏览器 API  │                                                                            │
 │ Isomorphic │ 仅限 useEffect/callback；零          │ CodeBlockRenderer、VideoRenderer、GalleryRenderer                          │
 │            │ @haklex/rich-editor-ui               │                                                                            │
 └────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 禁区：Static renderer 绝不可导入 @haklex/rich-editor-ui。这是 edit-only 包边界。

 双轨强制

 ┌──────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │    层    │                   Static (SSR safe)                   │                     Edit (browser-ok)                      │
 ├──────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │          │ 只存序列化数据，decorate() →                          │ 继承 StaticNode，管理 LexicalEditor 实例，新增             │
 │ Node     │ StaticDecorator/RendererWrapper，无 isEditable()      │ getContentEditor()/getCellEditors()，持有 slashMenuItems   │
 │          │ 分支，无 slashMenuItems                               │                                                            │
 ├──────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │ Renderer │ Isomorphic，无 @haklex/rich-editor-ui                 │ 可用 edit-ui 增强                                          │
 ├──────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │ Plugin   │ —                                                     │ 用 EditNode 工厂创建节点                                   │
 ├──────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │ 注册     │ config.ts → allNodes，enhancedRendererConfig          │ config-edit.ts → allEditNodes，enhancedEditRendererConfig  │
 └──────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 ---
 新增入口约定

 @haklex/rich-editor

 ┌───────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────┐
 │     入口      │                                               导出                                                │ Lexical   │
 │               │                                                                                                   │   依赖    │
 ├───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────┤
 │ . (现有)      │ 全部                                                                                              │ 有        │
 ├───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────┤
 │ ./editor      │ RichEditor                                                                                        │ 有        │
 │ (现有)        │                                                                                                   │           │
 ├───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────┤
 │ ./renderer    │ RichRenderer                                                                                      │ 有        │
 │ (现有)        │                                                                                                   │           │
 ├───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────┤
 │ ./static      │ allNodes, builtinNodes, customNodes, editorTheme, getVariantClass, variant classes,               │           │
 │ (新增)        │ RendererConfig type, contexts, RendererWrapper, createRendererDecoration,                         │ 有        │
 │               │ NestedContentRendererContext                                                                      │           │
 ├───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────┤
 │ ./styles      │ getVariantClass, variant classes, richContent, vars, theme classes（不含 editorTheme）            │ 无        │
 │ (新增)        │                                                                                                   │           │
 └───────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────┘

 ./styles 新建 src/styles-entry.ts，不导出 editorTheme（含 Lexical 类型 EditorThemeClasses）。editorTheme 仅从 ./static 导出。

 导入边界

 @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer ESLint：

 'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
   paths: [
     { name: '@haklex/rich-editor', message: 'Use /static or /styles' },
     { name: '@haklex/rich-editor-ui', message: 'Edit-only' },
   ]
 }]

 Phase 0：lint gate + NestedContentRendererContext

 Static renderer（packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/ + packages/rich-renderer-*/src/ +

 0.2 NestedContentRendererContext

 新建：packages/rich-editor/src/context/NestedContentRendererContext.tsx

 type RenderEditorStateFn = (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode
 const ctx = createContext<RenderEditorStateFn | null>(null)
 export const NestedContentRendererProvider = ctx.Provider
 export function useNestedContentRenderer() { ... }

 从 ./static 入口导出。

 ---
 Phase 1：节点改造 + 创建入口迁移

 1.0 文本提取辅助

 新建：packages/rich-editor/src/utils/extractTextContent.ts

 export function extractTextContent(state: SerializedEditorState): string {
   function walk(node: any): string {
     if (node.text) return node.text
     if (node.children) return node.children.map(walk).join('')
     if (node.root) return walk(node.root)
     return ''
   }
   return walk(state)
 }

 │ rich-renderer-codeblock │ Isomorphic-OK            │ 无需修改                                   │
 ├─────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 │ rich-renderer-video     │ Isomorphic-OK            │ 无需修改                                   │

 ├─────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 ├─────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 ├─────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 ├─────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 ├─────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 └─────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 ---
 Phase 3：@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer 引擎

 3.1 包结构

 packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
   src/
     index.ts
     RichSSRRenderer.tsx
     types.ts
     engine/
       renderNode.tsx
       renderBuiltinNode.tsx
       renderTextNode.tsx
     preprocess/
       footnote.ts
       headingSlug.ts

 3.2 依赖

 {
   "dependencies": { "@lexical/headless": "^0.40.0" },
   "peerDependencies": {
     "react": ">=19",
     "@haklex/rich-editor": ">=0.0.31",  // 只用 /static 和 /styles
     "lexical": "^0.40.0", "@lexical/code", "@lexical/extension",
     "@lexical/link", "@lexical/list", "@lexical/rich-text", "@lexical/table"
   }
 }

 3.3 核心流程

 1. createHeadlessEditor({
      nodes: allNodes + extraNodes,     // @haklex/rich-editor/static
      theme: editorTheme,               // @haklex/rich-editor/static
      editable: false,                  // ← CRITICAL：确保 decorate() 走 static 路径
    })
 2. editor.parseEditorState(json)
 3. editorState.read(() => {
      preprocess: footnote 编号 + heading slug
      walk → renderNode() 递归
      合成缺失 footnote-section
    })
 4. Provider 链:
      PortalThemeProvider → ColorSchemeProvider → RendererConfigProvider →
      FootnoteDefinitionsProvider → NestedContentRendererProvider
 5. <div class="rich-content {variantClass}" data-theme={theme}>

 3.4-3.8 （renderNode / renderBuiltinNode / renderTextNode / footnote / heading slug）

 同前版本，不重复。关键补充：editable: false 保证 GalleryNode/TldrawNode 的 decorate() 不输出编辑 callback。

 ---
 Phase 4：@haklex/rich-kit-shiro + Web 集成

 4.1 SSR 样式

 新建 packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/style-ssr.css：

 @import '@haklex/rich-editor/style.css';
 @import '@haklex/rich-renderers/style.css';
 @import '@haklex/rich-renderer-katex/style.css';
 @import '@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet/style.css';
 @import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css';

 不含：@haklex/rich-editor-ui/style.css、@haklex/rich-plugin-*/style.css、@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/style.css、@haklex/rich-ext-embed/s
 tyle.css。

 4.2 入口

 ┌────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬──────────────────┐
 │          入口          │                             依赖                             │       用途       │
 ├────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────┤
 │ ./ssr (新增)           │ @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer + @haklex/rich-renderers（static） │ Server Component │
 ├────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────┤
 │ ./style-ssr.css (新增) │ 仅 renderer CSS                                              │ SSR 样式         │
 ├────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────┤
 │ ./editor (现有)        │ @haklex/rich-renderers-edit（edit）                          │ 编辑器           │
 ├────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────┤
 │ ./renderer (现有)      │ @haklex/rich-renderers（static）                             │ CSR 只读         │
 ├────────────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼──────────────────┤
 │ ./style.css (现有)     │ 全量 CSS                                                     │ 编辑器/CSR 样式  │
 └────────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴──────────────────┘

 package.json 新增：
 "./ssr": "./src/ssr.tsx",
 "./style-ssr.css": "./src/style-ssr.css"

 4.3 ShiroEditor 节点更新

 // ShiroEditor.tsx
 import { TldrawEditNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit'  // 或 @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw
 import { galleryEditNodes } from '@haklex/rich-ext-gallery'   // 新导出

 const defaultExtraNodes = [
   TldrawEditNode,     // 原 TldrawNode
   // galleryEditNodes 包含 GalleryEditNode
   ...galleryEditNodes,
   ...embedEditNodes,
   ...linkCardEditNodes,
   ...katexEditNodes,
   ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
 ]

 4.4 Web app 接入

 新建 Server Component。现有 CSR 保留。

 ---
 Phase 5：回归验收

 验收标准

 1. renderToString(<RichSSRRenderer .../>) 输出语义 HTML
 2. Decorator → StaticRenderer，无手写 HTML
 3. Alert/banner/grid 嵌套 SSR 非空
 4. 根元素带 VE variant class
 5. enhancedRendererConfig 可注入
 6. RichRenderer（CSR）不退化
 7. 编辑器链路不退化：Plugin → EditNode 工厂 → EditDecorator + Transformer → EditNode 工厂
 8. Static renderer 零 @haklex/rich-editor-ui 导入（含 packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/）
 9. SSR 包零 @haklex/rich-editor 根路径
 10. editable: false：decorate() 不输出编辑 UI
 11. SlashMenuItems 仅在 EditNode 上，static node 无 slash config

 验证

 # 构建
 pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro
 build

 # SSR 引擎约束
 grep -rn "window\.\|document\.\|navigator\." packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
 grep -rn "from '@haklex/rich-editor'" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ | grep -v '/static\|/styles' && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
 grep -r "@lexical/react" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/dist/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

 # Static renderer 零 edit-ui（含 rich-editor 内置 renderers）
 grep -rn "@haklex/rich-editor-ui" \
   packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/ \
   packages/rich-renderer-*/src/ \
   packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx \
   packages/rich-ext-code-snippet/src/CodeSnippetRenderer.tsx \
   packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx \
   && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

 # Static node 无 slashMenuItems
 grep -rn "slashMenuItems" \
   packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts \
   packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts \
   packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts \
   packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts \
   packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts \
   && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

 # 编辑器链路
 pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
 # 手动：alert/banner/grid 嵌套编辑 + slash menu + markdown shortcut

const extToLang: Record<string, string> = {
  '.js': 'javascript',
  '.ts': 'typescript',
  '.mjs': 'javascript',
  '.cjs': 'javascript',
  '.mts': 'typescript',
  '.cts': 'typescript',
  '.jsx': 'jsx',
  '.tsx': 'tsx',
  '.md': 'markdown',
  '.css': 'css',
  '.scss': 'scss',
  '.html': 'html',
  '.json': 'json',

  '.toml': 'toml',
  '.xml': 'xml',
  '.sh': 'bash',

  '.go': 'go',
  '.py': 'python',
  '.rb': 'ruby',

  '.cpp': 'cpp',
  '.cs': 'csharp',
  '.rs': 'rust',
  '.swift': 'swift',
  '.kt': 'kotlin',
  '.lua': 'lua',
  '.sql': 'sql',
  '.graphql': 'graphql',
  '.scala': 'scala',
  '.dart': 'dart',
  '.vue': 'vue',
  '.h': 'c',
  '.hpp': 'cpp',
  '.m': 'objectivec',
  '.ex': 'elixir',
  '.r': 'r',
}

function getLangFromPath(path: string): string {
  const dot = path.lastIndexOf('.')
  if (dot === -1) return 'text'
  return extToLang[path.slice(dot).toLowerCase()] || 'text'
}

// Pre-warm Shiki import (runs once, resolved from cache on subsequent calls)
const shikiPromise = import('shiki/bundle/web').catch(() => null)

}

  bilibili: 'Bilibili',
  'github-file': 'GitHub File',
  'github-gist': 'GitHub Gist',

}

const LazyTweet = lazy(() =>
  import('react-tweet').then((mod) => ({ default: mod.IsolatedTweet })),
)

import { globalStyle, keyframes, style } from '@vanilla-extract/css'

const ASPECT_RATIO = '16 / 10'

export const tldrawStaticContainer = style({

})

})

---
import type { RichRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import {
  codeSnippetNodes,
  embedNodes,
  enhancedRendererConfig,
  galleryNodes,
  TldrawNode,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import { useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawNode,
  ...embedNodes,
  ...galleryNodes,
  ...codeSnippetNodes,
]

export interface ShiroRendererProps extends Omit<
  RichRendererProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
}

export function ShiroRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroRendererProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  return (
    <RichRenderer
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    />
  )
}

     3	import {

    10	import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    11	import { useMemo } from 'react'

    14	  TldrawNode,
    15	  ...embedNodes,
    16	  ...galleryNodes,
    17	  ...codeSnippetNodes,
    18	]
    19	
    20	export interface ShiroRendererProps extends Omit<
    21	  RichRendererProps,
    22	  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
    23	> {
    24	  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    25	}
    26	
    27	export function ShiroRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroRendererProps) {
    28	  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    29	    () =>
    30	      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    31	    [extraNodes],
    32	  )
    33	
    34	  return (
    35	    <RichRenderer
    36	      {...props}
    37	      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    38	      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-25 12:23:50Z)**_

发现 3 个仍会阻塞落地的问题（按严重度）：

1. **High**：你的“Static renderer 零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`”lint范围目前不可执行。  
你给的扫描范围包含整个 `packages/rich-renderer-*/src/`，但这些目录里本来就有 edit renderer（应允许 UI 依赖），例如 [AlertEditRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-alert/src/AlertEditRenderer.tsx:7)、[BannerEditRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderer-banner/src/BannerEditRenderer.tsx:7)、[CodeSnippetEditRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ext-code-snippet/src/CodeSnippetEditRenderer.tsx:3)。  
另外你还保留了 tooltip 版 footnote： [FootnoteRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer.tsx:1)。  
建议：lint改为“只扫 static 文件集合（排除 `*Edit*`）”或把 static/edit 物理分目录。

2. **High**：`StaticNode`“无 `slashMenuItems`”约束还没覆盖完整。  
你只迁移了 Alert/Banner/Grid/Tldraw/Gallery，但很多 base node 仍有 static slash menu：  
[CodeBlockNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/CodeBlockNode.ts:30)、[ImageNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/ImageNode.ts:67)、[VideoNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/VideoNode.ts:41)、[DetailsNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/DetailsNode.ts:31)、[LinkCardNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/LinkCardNode.ts:50)、[MermaidNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/MermaidNode.ts:28)。  
建议：要么把“无 static slashMenuItems”改成“仅对拆分节点强制”，要么补全到全量节点。

3. **Medium**：`style-ssr.css`与默认节点集不一致，容易出现 SSR 样式缺失或声明与事实不符。  
默认渲染节点仍包含 `embed`/`tldraw`：[ShiroRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroRenderer.tsx:13)。  
同时 `@haklex/rich-renderers/style.css` 已经隐式引入 tldraw 样式：[style.css](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderers/src/style.css:10)，但不包含 embed 样式。  
建议：先定清 SSR 默认是否支持 embed/tldraw；支持就把对应 CSS 明确纳入 `style-ssr.css`，不支持就从 SSR 默认 `extraNodes` 移除。

**结论**  
这版比上一版明显更接近可实施，核心方向是对的。现在主要是“规则定义”和“lint/样式/节点清单”三处还没完全对齐，先收敛这三点再让 Claude Code 开工会更稳。

---

_**User (2026-02-25 12:30:29Z)**_

review updated: # RichSSRRenderer 实施计划

## Context

`RichRenderer` SSR 输出空壳。本计划收紧 Static/Edit 双轨定义，使 Static 路径 100% SSR 安全（无 `LexicalNestedComposer`、无浏览器 API、无运行时分支），然后基于此构建 `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` headless 引擎。

---

## 核心约束

### Static Node 定义

1. 只存可序列化数据（`SerializedEditorState` / 基本类型），**不持有** `LexicalEditor` 实例
2. **无** `getContentEditor()` / `getCellEditors()` 方法
3. `decorate()` 返回 SSR-safe 组件（StaticDecorator / RendererWrapper），**无** `editor.isEditable()` 分支

**slashMenuItems 约束**：仅对**本次改造的拆分节点**强制——`slashMenuItems` 必须在 EditNode 上，StaticNode 不持有。本次改造节点：Alert、Banner、Grid、Tldraw、Gallery（共 5 个）。

**现有拆分节点**（CodeBlockNode/CodeBlockEditNode、LinkCardNode/LinkCardEditNode、KaTeXBlockNode/KaTeXBlockEditNode）——不在本次改造范围。其中 LinkCardEditNode 已有独立 slashMenuItems 覆盖（`rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardEditNode.ts:18`）。CodeBlockEditNode 继承 base 的 slashMenuItems（无功能问题，SSR 引擎不读取 slashMenuItems）。后续可单独清理。

**未拆分节点**（Image、Video、Details、Mermaid 等）——`slashMenuItems` 保留在 base class，无影响。

### Static Renderer 定义（两层）

| 类别 | 约束 | 例 |
|------|------|-----|
| **SSR-Core** | 零浏览器 API、零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`、零 `lucide-react` | `AlertRenderer`、`BannerRenderer`、`ImageRenderer`、**`FootnoteStaticRenderer`**（新） |
| **Isomorphic** | 首次 render 有意义 HTML；浏览器 API 仅限 `useEffect`/callback；零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` | `CodeBlockRenderer`、`VideoRenderer`、`GalleryRenderer` |

**禁区**：Static renderer **绝不可**导入 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`。这是 edit-only 包边界。

### 双轨强制

| 层 | Static (SSR safe) | Edit (browser-ok) |
|----|--------------------|-------------------|
| Node（拆分节点） | 只存序列化数据，`decorate()` → StaticDecorator/RendererWrapper，无 `isEditable()` 分支，无 `slashMenuItems` | 继承 StaticNode，管理 `LexicalEditor` 实例，新增 `getContentEditor()`/`getCellEditors()`，持有 `slashMenuItems` |
| Node（未拆分） | 同一 class 用于两个 config，`slashMenuItems` 保留在 base。`decorate()` 可根据 `isEditable()` 增减 callback props（不切换 renderer） | — |
| Renderer | Isomorphic，无 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` | 可用 edit-ui 增强 |
| Plugin | — | 用 EditNode 工厂创建节点 |
| 注册 | `config.ts` → `allNodes`，`enhancedRendererConfig` | `config-edit.ts` → `allEditNodes`，`enhancedEditRendererConfig` |

---

## 新增入口约定

### `@haklex/rich-editor`

| 入口 | 导出 | Lexical 依赖 |
|------|------|-------------|
| `.` (现有) | 全部 | 有 |
| `./editor` (现有) | RichEditor | 有 |
| `./renderer` (现有) | RichRenderer | 有 |
| **`./static` (新增)** | allNodes, builtinNodes, customNodes, **editorTheme**, getVariantClass, variant classes, RendererConfig type, contexts, RendererWrapper, createRendererDecoration, NestedContentRendererContext | 有 |
| **`./styles` (新增)** | getVariantClass, variant classes, richContent, vars, theme classes（**不含** editorTheme） | **无** |

`./styles` 新建 `src/styles-entry.ts`，不导出 `editorTheme`（含 Lexical 类型 `EditorThemeClasses`）。`editorTheme` 仅从 `./static` 导出。

### 导入边界

`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` ESLint：

```javascript
'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
  paths: [
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor', message: 'Use /static or /styles' },
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor-ui', message: 'Edit-only' },
  ]
}]
```

---

## Phase 0：lint gate + NestedContentRendererContext

### 0.1 ESLint（分层）

**SSR 引擎**（`packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/`）：

```javascript
'no-restricted-globals': ['error', 'window', 'document', 'navigator', 'location', 'history']
'no-restricted-imports': [/* 禁 react hooks + @haklex/rich-editor 根 + @haklex/rich-editor-ui */]
```

**Static renderer**（`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/` + `packages/rich-renderer-*/src/` + `packages/rich-ext-*/src/*Renderer.tsx`）：

```javascript
'no-restricted-imports': [/* 禁 @haklex/rich-editor-ui */]
```

### 0.2 NestedContentRendererContext

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/context/NestedContentRendererContext.tsx`

```typescript
type RenderEditorStateFn = (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode
const ctx = createContext<RenderEditorStateFn | null>(null)
export const NestedContentRendererProvider = ctx.Provider
export function useNestedContentRenderer() { ... }
```

从 `./static` 入口导出。

---

## Phase 1：节点改造 + 创建入口迁移

### 1.0 文本提取辅助

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/utils/extractTextContent.ts`

```typescript
export function extractTextContent(state: SerializedEditorState): string {
  function walk(node: any): string {
    if (node.text) return node.text
    if (node.children) return node.children.map(walk).join('')
    if (node.root) return walk(node.root)
    return ''
  }
  return walk(state)
}
```

### 1.1 AlertQuoteNode → AlertQuoteEditNode

**AlertQuoteNode** (`src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts`)：

- `__contentEditor` → `__contentState: SerializedEditorState`
- 删除 `createContentEditor()`、`getContentEditor()`
- 删除 `static slashMenuItems`（3 个条目 line 65-99，移入 EditNode）
- `constructor(alertType, contentState?)`
- `importJSON`：直接存 content
- `exportJSON`：直接输出 `__contentState`
- `getTextContent()`：`extractTextContent(this.__contentState)`
- `decorate()` → `AlertStaticDecorator`

**AlertQuoteEditNode** (`src/nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode.ts`)：

- 新增 `__contentEditor` + `createContentEditor()` + `getContentEditor()`
- **新增 `static slashMenuItems`**（从 base 移来，调用 `$createAlertQuoteEditNode`）
- 新增 `$createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType, contentState?)`
- `decorate()` → `AlertEditDecorator`

**AlertPlugin** (`src/plugins/AlertPlugin.tsx:17`)：

```typescript
// $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType) → $createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType)
import { $createAlertQuoteEditNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode'
```

**alert.ts transformer** (`src/transformers/alert.ts:27,52-53`)：

```typescript
// $createAlertQuoteNode → $createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType, content)
// 删除 getContentEditor() 调用
import { $createAlertQuoteEditNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode'
const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType, content)
parentNode.replace(alertNode)
```

**新建** `AlertStaticDecorator.tsx`。

### 1.2 BannerNode → BannerEditNode — 同 1.1

**BannerNode** (`src/nodes/BannerNode.ts`)：
- 删除 `static slashMenuItems`（line 76-89，移入 EditNode）
- 其余同 AlertQuoteNode

**BannerEditNode** (`src/nodes/BannerEditNode.ts`)：
- 新增 `static slashMenuItems`（调用 `$createBannerEditNode`）
- 新增 `$createBannerEditNode(bannerType, contentState?)`

**container.ts transformer** (`src/transformers/container.ts:33,60-61`)：`$createBannerNode` → `$createBannerEditNode`

**新建** `BannerStaticDecorator.tsx`。

### 1.3 GridContainerNode → GridEditNode

**GridContainerNode** (`src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`)：
- `__cellEditors` → `__cellStates: SerializedEditorState[]`
- 删除 `createCellEditor()`、`getCellEditors()`
- 新增 `getCellStates()`
- 删除 `static slashMenuItems`（line 54-68，移入 EditNode）
- `setCols()`/`addCells()`/`removeCells()` 操作 `__cellStates`
- `decorate()` → `GridStaticDecorator`

**GridEditNode** (`src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`)：
- 新增 `__cellEditors` + `createCellEditor()` + `getCellEditors()`
- 覆盖 `setCols()`/`addCells()`/`removeCells()` 同步 editors
- **新增 `static slashMenuItems`**（调用 `$createGridEditNode`）
- 新增 `$createGridEditNode(payload)`、`$isGridEditNode()`

**GridEditDecorator** (`src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`)：
- Line 68: `$isGridContainerNode` → `$isGridEditNode`（仅 `getCellEditors()` 调用处）
- 其余 `$isGridContainerNode` 保留（`getCols`/`setCols`/`addCells` 在 base 上）

**grid-container.ts transformer** (`src/transformers/grid-container.ts:14`)：
```typescript
// getCellEditors().map(editor => ...) → getCellStates().map(extractTextContent)
```

**新建** `GridStaticDecorator.tsx`。

### 1.4 TldrawNode → TldrawEditNode

**TldrawNode** (`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts`)：
- 删除 `static slashMenuItems`（line 34-47，移入 EditNode）
- 删除 `LazyStaticRenderer`/`LazyEditRenderer` lazy import
- `decorate()` → 始终返回 `TldrawSSRRenderer`（无 `isEditable()` 分支）

**TldrawEditNode** (**新建** `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditNode.ts`)：
- extends `TldrawNode`
- **新增 `static slashMenuItems`**（调用 `$createTldrawEditNode`）
- `decorate()` → `isEditable` 分支：edit → `LazyEditRenderer`，else → `LazyDisplayRenderer`
- 新增 `$createTldrawEditNode(snapshot)`、`$isTldrawEditNode()`

**TldrawSSRRenderer** (**新建** `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx`)：
- 纯 SSR 占位（snapshot 预览图 / placeholder），零浏览器 API、零 edit-ui

**TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx → rename to TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx**：保留现有逻辑。

**TldrawPlugin** (`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawPlugin.tsx:16`)：
```typescript
// $createTldrawNode → $createTldrawEditNode
```

**ShiroEditor** (`packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx:11,28`)：
```typescript
// import { TldrawNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
// → import { TldrawEditNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit' (或 @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw)
// defaultExtraNodes: TldrawNode → TldrawEditNode
```

### 1.5 GalleryNode → GalleryEditNode

**当前问题**（`packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts:123-144`）：
```typescript
decorate(editor) {
  const isEditable = editor.isEditable()  // line 125: 分支
  const props = { images, layout, ...(isEditable && { onImagesChange, onLayoutChange }) }
}
```

**GalleryNode** (base)：
- 删除 `static slashMenuItems`（移入 EditNode）
- `decorate()` → `createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, { images, layout })`（无分支）

**GalleryEditNode** (**新建** `packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryEditNode.ts`)：
- extends `GalleryNode`
- **新增 `static slashMenuItems`**
- `decorate()` → 传入 `onImagesChange`/`onLayoutChange` callbacks
- 新增 `$createGalleryEditNode(payload)`

**ShiroEditor** (`packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx`)：
- `galleryNodes` → 改为 `galleryEditNodes`（含 `GalleryEditNode`）

### 1.6 FootnoteRenderer split

**当前问题**（`src/components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer.tsx:1-5`）：
```typescript
import { TooltipContent, TooltipRoot, TooltipTrigger } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
```

**FootnoteStaticRenderer** (**新建** `src/components/renderers/FootnoteStaticRenderer.tsx`)：
- 纯 `<a>` 链接 + aria 属性，无 Tooltip
- 零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`、零浏览器 API（scrollIntoView 在 callback 中 → Isomorphic OK）
- 用作 FootnoteNode `decorate()` 的默认 renderer

**FootnoteRenderer** (现有，保留)：
- 保持 Tooltip 功能，作为 edit/CSR 增强版
- 注册到 `enhancedEditRendererConfig`（如 Footnote 键未在此 config 中，需新增）

**FootnoteNode** (`src/nodes/FootnoteNode.ts:74`)：
- `decorate()` → `createRendererDecoration('Footnote', FootnoteStaticRenderer, { identifier })`
- 默认 renderer 改为 `FootnoteStaticRenderer`

**enhancedEditRendererConfig** (`packages/rich-renderers-edit/src/config.ts`)：
- 新增 `Footnote: FootnoteRenderer`（含 Tooltip 的版本）

### 1.7 RichRenderer 补充 NestedContentRendererProvider

**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx`

加入 `NestedContentRendererProvider`，提供 headless Lexical 嵌套渲染函数。

新增 `@lexical/headless` dependency。

---

## Phase 2：Static Renderer SSR 适配

### 适配矩阵

| 包 | 状态 | 修复 |
|----|------|------|
| `rich-renderer-linkcard` | `useLayoutEffect` SSR 警告 | → `useEffect` |
| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | 首次 render "Loading" | `<pre><code>{diagram}</code></pre>` fallback |
| `rich-renderer-codeblock` | Isomorphic-OK | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-video` | Isomorphic-OK | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-image` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-alert` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-banner` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-mention` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-ext-code-snippet` | Isomorphic-OK | 无需修改 |
| `rich-ext-gallery` | Isomorphic-OK | 无需修改 |

---

## Phase 3：`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` 引擎

### 3.1 包结构

```
packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
  src/
    index.ts
    RichSSRRenderer.tsx
    types.ts
    engine/
      renderNode.tsx
      renderBuiltinNode.tsx
      renderTextNode.tsx
    preprocess/
      footnote.ts
      headingSlug.ts
```

### 3.2 依赖

```jsonc
{
  "dependencies": { "@lexical/headless": "^0.40.0" },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "react": ">=19",
    "@haklex/rich-editor": ">=0.0.31",  // 只用 /static 和 /styles
    "lexical": "^0.40.0", "@lexical/code", "@lexical/extension",
    "@lexical/link", "@lexical/list", "@lexical/rich-text", "@lexical/table"
  }
}
```

### 3.3 核心流程

```
1. createHeadlessEditor({
     nodes: allNodes + extraNodes,     // @haklex/rich-editor/static
     theme: editorTheme,               // @haklex/rich-editor/static
     editable: false,                  // ← CRITICAL：确保 decorate() 走 static 路径
   })
2. editor.parseEditorState(json)
3. editorState.read(() => {
     preprocess: footnote 编号 + heading slug
     walk → renderNode() 递归
     合成缺失 footnote-section
   })
4. Provider 链:
     PortalThemeProvider → ColorSchemeProvider → RendererConfigProvider →
     FootnoteDefinitionsProvider → NestedContentRendererProvider
5. <div class="rich-content {variantClass}" data-theme={theme}>
```

### 3.4-3.8 （renderNode / renderBuiltinNode / renderTextNode / footnote / heading slug）

同前版本，不重复。关键补充：`editable: false` 保证 GalleryNode/TldrawNode 的 `decorate()` 不输出编辑 callback。

---

## Phase 4：`@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` + Web 集成

### 4.1 SSR 样式

**新建** `packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/style-ssr.css`：

```css
@import '@haklex/rich-editor/style.css';
@import '@haklex/rich-renderers/style.css';   /* 已含 alert/banner/codeblock/gallery/image/linkcard/mention/mermaid/video/tldraw */
@import '@haklex/rich-renderer-katex/style.css';
@import '@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet/style.css';
@import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css';
```

**覆盖分析**：
- `@haklex/rich-renderers/style.css` 已含 tldraw 样式（line 10）+ gallery 样式（line 4），无需重复引入
- Embed 无 `style.css`，无需引入
- SSR 支持与 ShiroRenderer 相同的 extraNodes（TldrawNode + embedNodes + galleryNodes + codeSnippetNodes）

**不含**：`@haklex/rich-editor-ui/style.css`（edit-only UI 组件）、`@haklex/rich-plugin-*/style.css`（edit-only 插件）、`@haklex/rich-ext-embed/style.css`（不存在）。

### 4.2 入口

| 入口 | 依赖 | 用途 |
|------|------|------|
| `./ssr` (新增) | `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` + `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static） | Server Component |
| `./style-ssr.css` (新增) | 仅 renderer CSS | SSR 样式 |
| `./editor` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`（edit） | 编辑器 |
| `./renderer` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static） | CSR 只读 |
| `./style.css` (现有) | 全量 CSS | 编辑器/CSR 样式 |

**`package.json` 新增**：
```jsonc
"./ssr": "./src/ssr.tsx",
"./style-ssr.css": "./src/style-ssr.css"
```

### 4.3 ShiroEditor 节点更新

```typescript
// ShiroEditor.tsx
import { TldrawEditNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit'  // 或 @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw
import { galleryEditNodes } from '@haklex/rich-ext-gallery'   // 新导出

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawEditNode,     // 原 TldrawNode
  // galleryEditNodes 包含 GalleryEditNode
  ...galleryEditNodes,
  ...embedEditNodes,
  ...linkCardEditNodes,
  ...katexEditNodes,
  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
]
```

### 4.4 Web app 接入

**新建** Server Component。现有 CSR 保留。

---

## Phase 5：回归验收

### 验收标准

1. `renderToString(<RichSSRRenderer .../>)` 输出语义 HTML
2. Decorator → StaticRenderer，无手写 HTML
3. Alert/banner/grid 嵌套 SSR 非空
4. 根元素带 VE variant class
5. `enhancedRendererConfig` 可注入
6. `RichRenderer`（CSR）不退化
7. 编辑器链路不退化：Plugin → EditNode 工厂 → EditDecorator + Transformer → EditNode 工厂
8. Static renderer 零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 导入（含 `packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/`）
9. SSR 包零 `@haklex/rich-editor` 根路径
10. `editable: false`：`decorate()` 不输出编辑 UI
11. SlashMenuItems 仅在 EditNode 上，static node 无 slash config

### 验证

```bash
# 构建
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build

# SSR 引擎约束
grep -rn "window\.\|document\.\|navigator\." packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
grep -rn "from '@haklex/rich-editor'" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ | grep -v '/static\|/styles' && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
grep -r "@lexical/react" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/dist/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# Static renderer 零 edit-ui
# 注意：排除 *Edit* 文件（EditRenderer 允许导入 edit-ui）和 FootnoteRenderer.tsx（已知 edit/CSR 版本保留）
grep -rn "@haklex/rich-editor-ui" \
  --include="*.tsx" --exclude="*Edit*" --exclude="FootnoteRenderer.tsx" \
  packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/ \
  packages/rich-renderer-*/src/ \
  packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx \
  packages/rich-ext-code-snippet/src/CodeSnippetRenderer.tsx \
  packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx \
  && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# 本次改造拆分节点 base 无 slashMenuItems（仅检查本次改造的 5 个节点）
grep -rn "slashMenuItems" \
  packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts \
  packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts \
  packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts \
  packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts \
  packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts \
  && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
# 注：CodeBlockNode/LinkCardNode/KaTeXBlockNode 为已有拆分节点，slashMenuItems 迁移不在本次范围

# 编辑器链路
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
# 手动：alert/banner/grid 嵌套编辑 + slash menu + markdown shortcut
```

---

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-25 12:32:48Z)**_

1. **High**：`style-ssr.css` 对 Embed 的结论不成立。  
你写了“Embed 无 style.css”，但包里实际有样式导出：[package.json](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ext-embed/package.json:7)。同时 SSR 默认节点仍包含 `embedNodes`：[ShiroRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroRenderer.tsx:13)。  
建议：`style-ssr.css` 补 `@haklex/rich-ext-embed/style.css`，否则 embed 样式可能缺失。

2. **High**：Phase 0 的“static renderer lint 范围”仍和实际拆分冲突。  
你在策略里写了扫描 `packages/rich-renderer-*/src/`、`packages/rich-ext-*/src/*Renderer.tsx`，但这些目录包含 edit/display renderer（允许 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`），例如当前 tldraw display 源就是：[TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx:2)。  
建议：lint 规则改为“只对 static 文件清单生效”，不要按目录全量套。

3. **Medium**：`enhancedEditRendererConfig` 加 `Footnote: FootnoteRenderer` 还缺一个导出路径。  
目前 `rich-editor` 只导出 `FootnoteRendererProps` 类型，没有导出 `FootnoteRenderer` 值：[index.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/index.ts:85)。而 edit config 当前结构是：[config.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-renderers-edit/src/config.ts:1)。  
建议：先决定 `FootnoteRenderer` 从哪里导出（推荐 `@haklex/rich-editor/static`），否则这一步会卡编译。

4. **Medium**：验收标准 #11 与你上面的“只改 5 个节点”范围冲突。  
你正文已限定只迁移 Alert/Banner/Grid/Tldraw/Gallery，但 #11 仍写成全局“SlashMenuItems 仅在 EditNode 上”。当前还有 base node 保留 slashMenu（如 [CodeBlockNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/CodeBlockNode.ts:30)、[ImageNode.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/ImageNode.ts:67)）。  
建议：把 #11 改成“仅本次 5 个拆分节点强制”。

整体上这版已经接近可执行，主要就差这 4 处口径/边界对齐。

_**User (2026-02-25 15:24:14Z)**_

review: 修复 SSR 渲染器 + 统一为唯一 RichRenderer

 Context

 SSR 渲染器 (RichSSRRenderer) 未能复刻 Readonly Renderer 的效果。从截图对比可见：
 - Alert 块完全消失（SSR 下无 TIP 容器，仅剩后续文字）
 - Tldraw 只剩一条细线（SSR placeholder 过于简陋）

 根因：editor.getDecorators() 在 @lexical/headless 模式下返回空对象 {}。Lexical 的 decorator 机制仅在交互式渲染周期中填充，headless
 editor 不触发 decorate() 调用。导致所有
 DecoratorNode（Alert、Banner、Grid、Image、Mermaid、Video、LinkCard、KaTeX、Tldraw、Gallery、CodeBlock 等）全部丢失。

 修复后再执行包改名与统一。

 ---
 Part A：修复 SSR 引擎渲染

 A1：修复 DecoratorNode 渲染

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx

 问题：editor.getDecorators<ReactNode>() 返回 {}，renderTree 中 decorations[nodeKey] 永远 undefined。

 修复：在 renderTree 遍历中直接调用 node.decorate(editor, config) 代替 getDecorators() 查表。

 function renderTree(
   node: any,
   editor: LexicalEditor,
   headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
   key: string,
 ): ReactNode {
   const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key

   // DecoratorNode: 直接调用 decorate() 获取 ReactElement
   if (typeof node.decorate === 'function') {
     try {
       return node.decorate(editor, editor._config)
     } catch {
       return null
     }
   }

   const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}

   if (serialized.type === 'text') {
     return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
   }

   let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
   if (node.getChildren) {
     const childNodes = node.getChildren()
     if (childNodes.length > 0) {
       children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
         renderTree(child, editor, headingSlugs, `${nodeKey}-${i}`),
       )
     }
   }

   return renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs)
 }

 关键变更：
 - 移除 decorations 参数，移除 editor.getDecorators() 调用
 - 新增 editor 参数传递到 renderTree
 - DecoratorNode 检测：typeof node.decorate === 'function'
 - 直接 node.decorate(editor, editor._config) 返回 ReactElement
 - renderEditorToReact 和 renderNestedContent 同步更新签名

 安全性：
 - editable: false 确保所有 static node 的 decorate() 走静态路径
 - 无 isEditable() 分支（Phase 1 已消除）
 - 返回的 ReactElement 在 Provider 链内渲染，context hooks 正常工作

 A2：补全 renderBuiltinNode 缺失特性

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx

 已确认 class names 与 editorTheme 一致（rich-paragraph、rich-heading-h1、rich-quote、rich-link、rich-hr 等）。

 需补全：
 1. nested listitem：当 <li> 包含子 list 时，添加 rich-list-nested-item class
 2. details/spoiler：若 DetailsNode 等非 Decorator 的 ElementNode 需手动处理（检查 DetailsNode 是否 DecoratorNode — 是的话已由 A1
 覆盖）

 case 'listitem': {
   const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
   // 检查是否嵌套（children 中含 list）
   const hasNestedList = children && children.some(/* check */)
   const isNested = node.nested ?? false  // Lexical serializes this
   let cls = 'rich-list-item'
   if (isChecklist) {
     cls = node.checked ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked' : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   }
   if (isNested) {
     cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
   }
   return <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>{children}</li>
 }

 注：需确认 Lexical 序列化格式中嵌套 listitem 的标识方式（可能是 children 中包含 list 节点）。

 A3：验证 text format 渲染

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderTextNode.tsx

 已确认 class names 匹配 editorTheme.text.*：
 - rich-text-bold、rich-text-italic、rich-text-strikethrough、rich-text-underline
 - rich-text-code、rich-text-subscript、rich-text-superscript、rich-text-highlight

 无需修改。

import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
import {
  allNodes,
  ColorSchemeProvider,
  editorTheme,
  FootnoteDefinitionsProvider,
  getVariantClass,
  NestedContentRendererProvider,
  RendererConfigProvider,
} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import { $getRoot } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'

import { renderBuiltinNode } from './engine/renderBuiltinNode'
import { renderTextNode } from './engine/renderTextNode'
import { preprocessFootnotes } from './preprocess/footnote'
import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from './types'

function renderTree(
  node: any,
  decorations: Record<string, ReactNode>,
  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
  key: string,
): ReactNode {
  const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key

  if (decorations[nodeKey] !== undefined) {
    return decorations[nodeKey]
  }

  const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}

  if (serialized.type === 'text') {
    return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
  }

  let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
  if (node.getChildren) {
    const childNodes = node.getChildren()
    if (childNodes.length > 0) {
      children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
        renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `${nodeKey}-${i}`),
      )
    }
  }

  return renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs)
}

function renderEditorToReact(
  value: SerializedEditorState,
  nodes: any[],
): { content: ReactNode; footnoteData: ReturnType<typeof preprocessFootnotes>; renderNestedContent: (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode } {
  const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
    nodes,
    theme: editorTheme,
    editable: false,
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[RichSSRRenderer]', error)
    },
  })

  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(value)
  editor.setEditorState(editorState)

  const footnoteData = preprocessFootnotes(value)
  const decorations = editor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()

  let content: ReactNode = null
  editorState.read(() => {
    const root = $getRoot()
    const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    const children = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
      renderTree(child, decorations, headingSlugs, `ssr-${i}`),
    )
    content = <>{children}</>
  })

  const renderNestedContent = (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
    const nestedEditor = createHeadlessEditor({
      nodes,
      theme: editorTheme,
      editable: false,
      onError: (error: Error) => {
        console.error('[RichSSRRenderer:nested]', error)
      },
    })
    const nestedState = nestedEditor.parseEditorState(state)
    nestedEditor.setEditorState(nestedState)
    const nestedDecorations = nestedEditor.getDecorators<ReactNode>()
    let nested: ReactNode = null
    nestedState.read(() => {
      const root = $getRoot()
      const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
      const ch = root.getChildren().map((child: any, i: number) =>
        renderTree(child, nestedDecorations, headingSlugs, `nested-${i}`),
      )
      nested = <>{ch}</>
    })
    return nested
  }

  return { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent }
}

export function RichSSRRenderer({
  value,
  variant = 'article',
  theme = 'light',
  className,
  style,
  as: Component = 'div',
  rendererConfig,
  extraNodes,
}: RichSSRRendererProps) {
  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes

  const { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent } = renderEditorToReact(value, nodes)

  const classes = ['rich-content', variantClass, className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')

  return (
    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
        <RendererConfigProvider
          config={rendererConfig}
          mode="renderer"
          variant={variant}
        >
          <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
            definitions={footnoteData.definitions}
            displayNumberMap={footnoteData.displayNumberMap}
          >
            <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
              <Component
                className={classes}
                style={style}
                data-theme={theme}
              >
                {content}
              </Component>
            </NestedContentRendererProvider>
          </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
        </RendererConfigProvider>
      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    </PortalThemeProvider>
  )
}
---
// Re-export for potential external use
export { renderBuiltinNode } from './renderBuiltinNode'
export { renderTextNode } from './renderTextNode'
---

  return text
    .

import type { Klass, LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import type { CSSProperties } from 'react'

import type { ColorScheme, RendererConfig, RichEditorVariant } from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'

export interface RichSSRRendererProps {
  value: SerializedEditorState
  variant?: RichEditorVariant
  theme?: ColorScheme
  className?: string
  style?: CSSProperties
  as?: keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
  rendererConfig?: RendererConfig
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
}

import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import { RichSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import {
  codeSnippetNodes,
  embedNodes,
  enhancedRendererConfig,
  galleryNodes,
  TldrawNode,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import { useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawNode,
  ...embedNodes,
  ...galleryNodes,
  ...codeSnippetNodes,
]

export interface ShiroSSRRendererProps extends Omit<
  RichSSRRendererProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
}

export function ShiroSSRRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroSSRRendererProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  return (
    <RichSSRRenderer
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    />
  )
}
