import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { TldrawSSRRenderer } from './TldrawSSRRenderer'

export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
  { snapshot: string },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __snapshot: string

  static getType(): string {
    return 'tldraw'
  }

  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__snapshot = snapshot
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'tldraw',
      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  getSnapshot(): string {
    return this.__snapshot
  }

  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createElement(TldrawSSRRenderer, {
      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    })
  }
}

export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
}

export function $isTldrawNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is TldrawNode {
  return node instanceof TldrawNode
}
---
import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor, LexicalNode, NodeKey } from 'lexical'
import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'

import { TldrawNode, type SerializedTldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'

const LazyDisplayRenderer = lazy(() =>
  import('./TldrawDisplayRenderer').then((m) => ({
    default: m.TldrawDisplayRenderer,
  })),
)
const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
  })),
)

export class TldrawEditNode extends TldrawNode {
  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Whiteboard',
      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
      section: 'MEDIA',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createTldrawEditNode('{}')])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static clone(node: TldrawEditNode): TldrawEditNode {
    return new TldrawEditNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(snapshot, key)
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawEditNode {
    return new TldrawEditNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
  }

  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    const nodeKey = this.__key
    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()

    const fallback = createElement('div', {
      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
      style: {
        position: 'relative',
        width: '100%',
        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
        margin: '1rem 0',
      },
    })

    if (isEditable) {
      return createElement(
        Suspense,
        { fallback },
        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
            editor.update(() => {
              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
              if (node) {
                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
              }
            })
          },
        }),
      )
    }

    return createElement(
      Suspense,
      { fallback },
      createElement(LazyDisplayRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
    )
  }
}

export function $createTldrawEditNode(snapshot: string): TldrawEditNode {
  return new TldrawEditNode(snapshot)
}

export function $isTldrawEditNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is TldrawEditNode {
  return node instanceof TldrawEditNode
}

import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

export interface FootnoteData {
  definitions: Record<string, string>
  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
}

export function preprocessFootnotes(state: SerializedEditorState): FootnoteData {
  const definitions: Record<string, string> = {}
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  const displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
  let counter = 1

  function walk(node: any): void {
    if (node.type === 'footnote' && node.identifier) {
      const id = node.identifier
      if (!seen.has(id)) {
        seen.add(id)
        displayNumberMap[id] = counter++
      }
    }
    if (node.type === 'footnote-section' && node.definitions) {
      Object.assign(definitions, node.definitions)
    }
    if (node.children) {
      for (const child of node.children) walk(child)
    }
    if (node.root) walk(node.root)
    if (node.content && typeof node.content === 'object' && node.content.root) {
      walk(node.content)
    }
    if (node.cells && Array.isArray(node.cells)) {
      for (const cell of node.cells) {
        if (cell && cell.root) walk(cell)
      }
    }
  }

  walk(state)

  for (const id of seen) {
    if (!(id in definitions)) {
      definitions[id] = ''
    }
  }

  return { definitions, displayNumberMap }
}
---
export function textToSlug(text: string): string {
  return text
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim()
    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
}

import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedElementNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { $insertNodes, ElementNode } from 'lexical'
import { ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
import { createLucideSvg } from '../utils/lucide-dom'

type IconNode = [string, Record<string, string>][]

const ChevronDownIconNode: IconNode = [['path', { d: 'M6 8L10 12L14 8' }]]

export type SerializedDetailsNode = Spread<
  {
    summary: string
    open: boolean
  },
  SerializedElementNode
>

export class DetailsNode extends ElementNode {
  __summary: string
  __open: boolean

  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Details',
      icon: createElement(ChevronRight, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Collapsible content block',
      keywords: ['details', 'toggle', 'collapse', 'accordion'],
      section: 'ADVANCED',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createDetailsNode('Details')])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static getType(): string {
    return 'details'
  }

  static clone(node: DetailsNode): DetailsNode {
    return new DetailsNode(node.__summary, node.__open, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(summary: string, open = false, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__summary = summary
    this.__open = open
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const details = document.createElement('details')
    details.className = 'rich-details'
    if (this.__open) {
      details.open = true
    }

    const summary = document.createElement('summary')
    summary.className = 'rich-details-summary'

    const label = document.createElement('span')
    label.className = 'rich-details-summary-text'
    label.textContent = this.__summary
    summary.append(label)

    const chevron = document.createElement('span')
    chevron.className = 'rich-details-chevron'
    chevron.append(
      createLucideSvg(ChevronDownIconNode, {
        width: '20',
        height: '20',
        viewBox: '0 0 20 20',
        'stroke-width': '1.5',
      }),
    )
    summary.append(chevron)

    const content = document.createElement('div')
    content.className = 'rich-details-content'
    details.append(summary, content)

    return details
  }

  updateDOM(prevNode: DetailsNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
    const details = dom as HTMLDetailsElement
    if (prevNode.__open !== this.__open) {
      details.open = this.__open
    }
    if (prevNode.__summary !== this.__summary) {
      const label = dom.querySelector('.rich-details-summary-text')
      if (label) {
        label.textContent = this.__summary
      }
    }
    return false
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedDetailsNode): DetailsNode {
    return $createDetailsNode(serializedNode.summary, serializedNode.open)
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedDetailsNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'details',
      summary: this.__summary,
      open: this.__open,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  getSummary(): string {
    return this.getLatest().__summary
  }

  setSummary(summary: string): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__summary = summary
  }

  getOpen(): boolean {
    return this.getLatest().__open
  }

  setOpen(open: boolean): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__open = open
  }

  toggleOpen(): void {
    this.setOpen(!this.getOpen())
  }

  getDOMSlot(element: HTMLElement) {
    const content = element.querySelector(
      '.rich-details-content',
    ) as HTMLElement
    return super.getDOMSlot(element).withElement(content)
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }
}

export function $createDetailsNode(summary: string, open = false): DetailsNode {
  return new DetailsNode(summary, open)
}

export function $isDetailsNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is DetailsNode {
  return node instanceof DetailsNode
}

import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

import { useNestedContentRenderer } from '../../context/NestedContentRendererContext'

interface GridStaticDecoratorProps {
  cols: number
  gap: string
  cellStates: SerializedEditorState[]
}

export function GridStaticDecorator({
  cols,
  gap,
  cellStates,
}: GridStaticDecoratorProps) {
  const renderContent = useNestedContentRenderer()

  return (
    <div
      className="rich-grid-inner"
      style={{
        display: 'grid',
        gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)`,
        gap,
      }}
    >
      {cellStates.map((state, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="rich-grid-cell">
          {renderContent(state)}
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createContext, use } from 'react'

export type RenderEditorStateFn = (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode

const NestedContentRendererContext = createContext<RenderEditorStateFn | null>(
  null,
)

export const NestedContentRendererProvider =
  NestedContentRendererContext.Provider

export function useNestedContentRenderer(): RenderEditorStateFn {
  const fn = use(NestedContentRendererContext)
  if (!fn) {
    throw new Error(
      'useNestedContentRenderer must be used within a NestedContentRendererProvider',
    )
  }
  return fn
}

import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'

import { FootnoteStaticRenderer } from '../components/renderers/FootnoteStaticRenderer'
import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'

export type SerializedFootnoteNode = Spread<
  {
    identifier: string
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export class FootnoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __identifier: string

  static getType(): string {
    return 'footnote'
  }

  static clone(node: FootnoteNode): FootnoteNode {
    return new FootnoteNode(node.__identifier, node.__key)
  }

  constructor(identifier: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__identifier = identifier
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const sup = document.createElement('sup')
    sup.className = 'rich-footnote'
    return sup
  }

  updateDOM(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return true
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedFootnoteNode): FootnoteNode {
    return $createFootnoteNode(serializedNode.identifier)
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedFootnoteNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'footnote',
      identifier: this.__identifier,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  getIdentifier(): string {
    return this.getLatest().__identifier
  }

  setIdentifier(identifier: string): void {
    const writable = this.getWritable()
    writable.__identifier = identifier
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createRendererDecoration('Footnote', FootnoteStaticRenderer, {
      identifier: this.__identifier,
    })
  }
}

export function $createFootnoteNode(identifier: string): FootnoteNode {
  return new FootnoteNode(identifier)
}

export function $isFootnoteNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is FootnoteNode {
  return node instanceof FootnoteNode
}

import type { MouseEvent } from 'react'
import { useCallback } from 'react'

import {
  useFootnoteContent,
  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'

export interface FootnoteStaticRendererProps {
  identifier: string
}

export function FootnoteStaticRenderer({
  identifier,
}: FootnoteStaticRendererProps) {
  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)

  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`

  const handleClick = useCallback(
    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
      const target =
        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
      if (!target) return

      e.preventDefault()
      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')

      window.setTimeout(() => {
        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
      }, 1200)
    },
    [identifier, targetId],
  )

  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier

  return (
    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
      <a
        className="rich-footnote-ref"
        href={`#${targetId}`}
        id={referenceId}
        role="doc-noteref"
        aria-label={
          content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
        }
        onClick={handleClick}
        data-footnote-ref={identifier}
      >
        {label}
      </a>
    </span>
  )
}

import { GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

import { $createAlertQuoteEditNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode'
import {
  AlertQuoteNode,
  type AlertType,
} from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'

const ALERT_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, AlertType> = {
  NOTE: 'note',
  TIP: 'tip',
  IMPORTANT: 'important',
  WARNING: 'warning',
  CAUTION: 'caution',
}

export const GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  ...BASE,
  dependencies: [AlertQuoteNode],
  regExp: /^>\s*\[!(NOTE|TIP|IMPORTANT|WARNING|CAUTION)\]\s*$/,
  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    const typeKey = match[1]
    const alertType = ALERT_TYPE_MAP[typeKey] || 'note'

    const serializedChildren = children.map((child) => child.exportJSON())
    const content = {
      root: {
        children: [
          {
            type: 'paragraph',
            children: serializedChildren,
            direction: null,
            format: '',
            indent: 0,
            textFormat: 0,
            textStyle: '',
            version: 1,
          },
        ],
        direction: null,
        format: '',
        indent: 0,
        type: 'root',
        version: 1,
      },
    } as unknown as SerializedEditorState

    const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType, content)
    parentNode.replace(alertNode)
  },
}

import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'

import { $createBannerEditNode } from '../nodes/BannerEditNode'
import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'

const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
  note: 'note',
  info: 'note',
  tip: 'tip',
  success: 'tip',
  important: 'important',
  warning: 'warning',
  warn: 'warning',
  error: 'caution',
  danger: 'caution',
  caution: 'caution',
}

export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  ...BASE,
  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    const type = match[1]
    const params = match[2]

    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]

      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
        child.exportJSON(),
      )
      const content = {
        root: {
          children: [
            {
              type: 'paragraph',
              children: serializedChildren,
              direction: null,
              format: '',
              indent: 0,
              textFormat: 0,
              textStyle: '',
              version: 1,
            },
          ],
          direction: null,
          format: '',
          indent: 0,
          type: 'root',
          version: 1,
        },
      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState

      const banner = $createBannerEditNode(bannerType, content)
      parentNode.replace(banner)
      return
    }

    if (type === 'details') {
      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'

      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)

      children.forEach((child) => {
        details.append(child)
      })

      parentNode.replace(details)
      return
    }

    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    children.forEach((child) => {
      paragraph.append(child)
    })
    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
  },
}

import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
import type { LexicalNode } from 'lexical'

import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../nodes/GridContainerNode'
import { extractTextContent } from '../utils/extractTextContent'

function quoteAttr(value: string): string {
  return value.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
}

export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
  dependencies: [],
  export: (node: LexicalNode) => {
    if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return null
    const cells = node.getCellStates().map((state) => extractTextContent(state))
    const body = cells.map((content) => `::: cell\n${content}\n:::`).join('\n')
    return `::: grid{cols=${node.getCols()} gap="${quoteAttr(node.getGap())}"}\n${body}\n:::`
  },
  regExp: /a^/,
  replace: () => {},
  type: 'element',
}

import type { RichEditorProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { BlockHandlePlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle'
import { FloatingToolbarPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar'
import { FloatingLinkEditorPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit'
import { SlashMenuPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu'
import {
  TableCellResizerPlugin,
  TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin,
} from '@haklex/rich-plugin-table'
import { galleryEditNodes, TldrawEditNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
import {
  codeSnippetEditNodes,
  ConvertToLinkCardAction,
  embedEditNodes,
  EmbedPlugin,
  enhancedEditRendererConfig,
  katexEditNodes,
  linkCardEditNodes,
  PasteLinkCardPlugin,
  TldrawPlugin,
} from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [
  TldrawEditNode,
  ...embedEditNodes,
  ...linkCardEditNodes,
  ...katexEditNodes,
  ...galleryEditNodes,
  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
]

export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
  RichEditorProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
  actions?: ReactNode
  selfHostnames?: string[]
}

export function ShiroEditor({
  extraNodes,
  actions,
  children,
  selfHostnames,
  ...props
}: ShiroEditorProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  const renderLinkExtraActions = useCallback(
    ({
      url,
      linkKey,
      actionButtonClassName,
    }: {
      url: string
      linkKey: string
      actionButtonClassName: string
    }) => (
      <ConvertToLinkCardAction
        url={url}
        linkKey={linkKey}
        className={actionButtonClassName}
      />
    ),
    [],
  )

  return (
    <RichEditor
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
      actions={
        <>
          <SlashMenuPlugin />
          {actions}
        </>
      }
    >
      <BlockHandlePlugin />
      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
      <FloatingLinkEditorPlugin renderExtraActions={renderLinkExtraActions} />
      <TldrawPlugin />
      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
      <PasteLinkCardPlugin />
      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
      {children}
    </RichEditor>
  )
}

     1	import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2	
     3	function textToSlug(text: string): string {
     4	  return text
     5	    .toLowerCase()
     6	    .trim()
     7	    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
     8	    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
     9	    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    10	}
    11	
    12	function extractText(node: any): string {
    13	  if (node.text) return node.text
    14	  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    15	  return ''
    16	}
    17	
    18	export function renderBuiltinNode(
    19	  node: any,
    20	  key: string,
    21	  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    22	  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    23	): ReactNode {
    24	  switch (node.type) {
    25	    case 'root':
    26	      return <>{children}</>
    27	    case 'paragraph': {
    28	      const align = node.format ? { textAlign: node.format } as const : undefined
    29	      return <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>{children}</p>
    30	    }
    31	    case 'heading': {
    32	      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    33	      const text = extractText(node)
    34	      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    35	      let slug = baseSlug
    36	      if (baseSlug) {
    37	        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    38	        if (count !== undefined) {
    39	          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    40	          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    41	        } else {
    42	          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    43	        }
    44	      }
    45	      return (
    46	        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    47	          {slug && <a className="rich-heading-anchor" aria-hidden="true" tabIndex={-1} href={`#${slug}`} />}
    48	          {children}
    49	        </Tag>
    50	      )
    51	    }
    52	    case 'quote':
    53	      return <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">{children}</blockquote>
    54	    case 'list': {
    55	      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
    56	      const cls = node.listType === 'number' ? 'rich-list-ol'
    57	        : node.listType === 'check' ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul' : 'rich-list-ul'
    58	      return <Tag key={key} className={cls} start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}>{children}</Tag>
    59	    }
    60	    case 'listitem': {
    61	      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    62	      const cls = isChecklist
    63	        ? (node.checked ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked' : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked')
    64	        : 'rich-list-item'
    65	      return <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>{children}</li>
    66	    }
    67	    case 'link':
    68	      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target={node.target} rel={node.rel}>{children}</a>
    69	    case 'autolink':
    70	      return <a key={key} className="rich-link" href={node.url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{children}</a>
    71	    case 'horizontalrule':
    72	      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
    73	    case 'table':
    74	      return (
    75	        <div key={key} className="rich-table-scrollable-wrapper">
    76	          <table className="rich-table">{children}</table>
    77	        </div>
    78	      )
    79	    case 'tablerow':
    80	      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
    81	    case 'tablecell': {
    82	      const CellTag = node.headerState ? 'th' : 'td'
    83	      const cls = node.headerState ? 'rich-table-cell-header' : 'rich-table-cell'
    84	      return <CellTag key={key} className={cls} colSpan={node.colSpan > 1 ? node.colSpan : undefined}>{children}</CellTag>
    85	    }
    86	    case 'code':
    87	      return <pre key={key} className="rich-code-block"><code>{children}</code></pre>
    88	    case 'code-highlight':
    89	      return <span key={key}>{node.text}</span>
    90	    case 'linebreak':
    91	      return <br key={key} />
    92	    case 'tab':
    93	      return <span key={key}>{'  '}</span>
    94	    default:
    95	      return null
    96	  }
    97	}

    14	export function renderTextNode(node: any, key: string): ReactNode {

    13	 * Renders <hr> with class "rich-hr" for styling.
    14	 */
    15	export class HorizontalRuleNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
    16	  static getType(): string {
    17	    return 'horizontalrule'
    18	  }
    19	
    20	  static clone(node: HorizontalRuleNode): HorizontalRuleNode {
    21	    return new HorizontalRuleNode(node.__key)
    22	  }
    23	
    24	  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
    25	    super(key)
    26	  }
    27	
    28	  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    29	    const hr = document.createElement('hr')
    30	    hr.className = 'rich-hr'
    31	    hr.dataset.lexicalDecorator = 'true'
    32	    hr.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false')
    33	    return hr
    34	  }
    35	
    36	  updateDOM(): boolean {
    37	    return false
    38	  }
    39	
    40	  static importJSON(
    41	    _serializedNode: SerializedHorizontalRuleNode,
    42	  ): HorizontalRuleNode {
    43	    return $createHorizontalRuleNode()
    44	  }
    45	
    46	  exportJSON(): SerializedHorizontalRuleNode {
    47	    return {
    48	      ...super.exportJSON(),
    49	      type: 'horizontalrule',
    50	      version: 1,
    51	    }
    52	  }
    53	
    54	  decorate(): null {
    55	    return null
    56	  }
    57	}
    58	
    59	export function $createHorizontalRuleNode(): HorizontalRuleNode {
    60	  return new HorizontalRuleNode()
    61	}
    62	
    63	export function $isHorizontalRuleNode(
    64	  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    65	): node is HorizontalRuleNode {
    66	  return node instanceof HorizontalRuleNode
    67	}
```

    72	    label.textContent = this.__summary

     9	export class SpoilerNode extends ElementNode {

    21	
    22	  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    23	    const span = document.createElement('span')
    24	    span.className = 'rich-spoiler'
    25	    span.setAttribute('role', 'button')
    26	    span.setAttribute('tabindex', '0')
    27	    span.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Spoiler (click to reveal)')
    28	
    29	    const toggle = () => {
    30	      if (span.isContentEditable) return
    31	      const revealed = span.classList.toggle('rich-spoiler-revealed')
    32	      span.setAttribute(
    33	        'aria-label',
    34	        revealed ? 'Spoiler (revealed)' : 'Spoiler (click to reveal)',
    35	      )
    36	    }
    37	
    38	    span.addEventListener('click', toggle)
    39	    span.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    40	      if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
    41	        e.preventDefault()
    42	        toggle()
    43	      }
    44	    })
    45	
    46	    return span
    47	  }

     1	import {
     2	  TooltipContent,
     3	  TooltipRoot,
     4	  TooltipTrigger,
     5	} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     6	import type { HTMLAttributes, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     7	import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8	
     9	import {
    10	  useFootnoteContent,
    11	  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
    12	} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
    13	
    14	export interface FootnoteRendererProps {
    15	  identifier: string
    16	}
    17	
    18	export function FootnoteRenderer({ identifier }: FootnoteRendererProps) {
    19	  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
    20	  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)
    21	
    22	  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    23	  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    24	
    25	  const handleClick = useCallback(
    26	    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    27	      const target =
    28	        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
    29	        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
    30	      if (!target) return
    31	
    32	      e.preventDefault()
    33	      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    34	      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    35	
    36	      window.setTimeout(() => {
    37	        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    38	      }, 1200)
    39	    },
    40	    [identifier, targetId],
    41	  )
    42	
    43	  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier
    44	
    45	  return (
    46	    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
    47	      <TooltipRoot>
    48	        <TooltipTrigger
    49	          render={(props: HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>) => (
    50	            <a
    51	              {...props}
    52	              className="rich-footnote-ref"
    53	              href={`#${targetId}`}
    54	              id={referenceId}
    55	              role="doc-noteref"
    56	              aria-label={
    57	                content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
    58	              }
    59	              onClick={handleClick}
    60	              data-footnote-ref={identifier}
    61	            >
    62	              {label}
    63	            </a>
    64	          )}
    65	        />
    66	        {content ? <TooltipContent>{content}</TooltipContent> : null}
    67	      </TooltipRoot>
    68	    </span>
    69	  )
    70	}
```
</details></tool-use>

     1	import type {
     2	  EditorConfig,
     3	  LexicalEditor,
     4	  LexicalNode,
     5	  NodeKey,
     6	  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7	  Spread,
     8	} from 'lexical'
     9	import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10	import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    11	
    12	import { FootnoteStaticRenderer } from '../components/renderers/FootnoteStaticRenderer'
    13	import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
    14	
    15	export type SerializedFootnoteNode = Spread<
    16	  {
    17	    identifier: string
    18	  },
    19	  SerializedLexicalNode
    20	>
    21	
    22	export class FootnoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    23	  __identifier: string
    24	
    25	  static getType(): string {
    26	    return 'footnote'
    27	  }
    28	
    29	  static clone(node: FootnoteNode): FootnoteNode {
    30	    return new FootnoteNode(node.__identifier, node.__key)
    31	  }
    32	
    33	  constructor(identifier: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    34	    super(key)
    35	    this.__identifier = identifier
    36	  }
    37	
    38	  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    39	    const sup = document.createElement('sup')
    40	    sup.className = 'rich-footnote'
    41	    return sup
    42	  }
    43	
    44	  updateDOM(): boolean {
    45	    return false
    46	  }
    47	
    48	  isInline(): boolean {
    49	    return true
    50	  }
    51	
    52	  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedFootnoteNode): FootnoteNode {
    53	    return $createFootnoteNode(serializedNode.identifier)
    54	  }
    55	
    56	  exportJSON(): SerializedFootnoteNode {
    57	    return {
    58	      ...super.exportJSON(),
    59	      type: 'footnote',
    60	      identifier: this.__identifier,
    61	      version: 1,
    62	    }
    63	  }
    64	
    65	  getIdentifier(): string {
    66	    return this.getLatest().__identifier
    67	  }
    68	
    69	  setIdentifier(identifier: string): void {
    70	    const writable = this.getWritable()
    71	    writable.__identifier = identifier
    72	  }
    73	
    74	  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    75	    return createRendererDecoration('Footnote', FootnoteStaticRenderer, {
    76	      identifier: this.__identifier,
    77	    })
    78	  }
    79	}
    80	
    81	export function $createFootnoteNode(identifier: string): FootnoteNode {
    82	  return new FootnoteNode(identifier)
    83	}
    84	
    85	export function $isFootnoteNode(
    86	  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    87	): node is FootnoteNode {
    88	  return node instanceof FootnoteNode
    89	}

     2	import { createElement } from 'react'
     3	
     4	import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5	import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6	
     7	export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig
     8	
     9	type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10	  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11	    infer P extends object
    12	  >
    13	    ? P
    14	    : never
    15	}
    16	
    17	type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18	  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19	    RendererConfig[K]
    20	  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21	    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22	    : never
    23	}
    24	
    25	export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26	  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27	    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28	    rendererKey: K
    29	    /** Default renderer component */
    30	    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31	    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32	    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33	  }
    34	}[RendererKey]
    35	
    36	/**
    37	 * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38	 * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39	 */
    40	export function RendererWrapper({
    41	  rendererKey,
    42	  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43	  props,
    44	}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45	  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46	  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47	
    48	  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49	}
    50	
    51	/**
    52	 * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53	 * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54	 */
    55	export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56	  rendererKey: K,
    57	  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58	  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59	): ReactElement {
    60	  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61	    rendererKey,
    62	    defaultRenderer,
    63	    props,
    64	  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65	}

     1	import type { RichSSRRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
     2	import { RichSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
     3	import {
     4	  codeSnippetNodes,
     5	  embedNodes,
     6	  enhancedRendererConfig,
     7	  galleryNodes,
     8	  TldrawNode,
     9	} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    10	import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    11	import { useMemo } from 'react'
    12	
    13	const defaultExtraNodes = [
    14	  TldrawNode,
    15	  ...embedNodes,
    16	  ...galleryNodes,
    17	  ...codeSnippetNodes,
    18	]
    19	
    20	export interface ShiroSSRRendererProps extends Omit<
    21	  RichSSRRendererProps,
    22	  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
    23	> {
    24	  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    25	}
    26	
    27	export function ShiroSSRRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroSSRRendererProps) {
    28	  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    29	    () =>
    30	      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    31	    [extraNodes],
    32	  )
    33	
    34	  return (
    35	    <RichSSRRenderer
    36	      {...props}
    37	      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    38	      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    39	    />
    40	  )
    41	}
```
</details></tool-use>

    79	    }

    85	    )
    86	  }

     1	import type { FC } from 'react'
     2	
     3	export interface TldrawSSRRendererProps {
     4	  snapshot: string
     5	}
     6	
     7	export const TldrawSSRRenderer: FC<TldrawSSRRendererProps> = ({ snapshot }) => {
     8	  let label = 'Tldraw Whiteboard'
     9	  try {
    10	    const data = JSON.parse(snapshot)
    11	    if (data && typeof data === 'object') {
    12	      const shapeCount = Object.keys(data).filter((k) =>
    13	        k.startsWith('shape:'),
    14	      ).length
    15	      if (shapeCount > 0) {
    16	        label = `Tldraw Whiteboard (${shapeCount} shapes)`
    17	      }
    18	    }
    19	  } catch {
    20	    // snapshot might be a URL ref or invalid JSON — show generic placeholder
    21	  }
    22	
    23	  return (
    24	    <div
    25	      className="rich-tldraw-ssr-placeholder"
    26	      style={{
    27	        position: 'relative',
    28	        width: '100%',
    29	        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
    30	        display: 'flex',
    31	        alignItems: 'center',
    32	        justifyContent: 'center',
    33	        backgroundColor: 'var(--rich-tldraw-bg, #f5f5f5)',
    34	        borderRadius: '8px',
    35	        border: '1px solid var(--rich-tldraw-border, #e5e5e5)',
    36	        color: 'var(--rich-tldraw-fg, #737373)',
    37	        fontSize: '14px',
    38	      }}
    39	      aria-label={label}
    40	    >
    41	      <span>{label}</span>
    42	    </div>
    43	  )
    44	}
```

    15	export const TldrawDisplayRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({

    18	  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20	  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21	
    22	  useEffect(() => {
    23	    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24	    const target = containerRef.current
    25	    if (!target) return
    26	
    27	    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28	      (entries) => {
    29	        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30	          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31	          observer.disconnect()
    32	        }
    33	      },
    34	      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35	    )
    36	    observer.observe(target)
    37	    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38	  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39	
    40	  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41	    return (
    42	      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43	        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44	      </div>
    45	    )
    46	  }
    47	
    48	  return (

    52	  )
    53	}

    51	  constructor(payload: GalleryNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    52	    super(payload, key)
    53	  }
    54	
    55	  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGalleryNode): GalleryEditNode {
    56	    return new GalleryEditNode({
    57	      images: serializedNode.images,
    58	      layout: serializedNode.layout,
    59	    })
    60	  }
    61	
    62	  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    63	    const nodeKey = this.__key
    64	    const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
    65	      images: this.__images,
    66	      layout: this.__layout,
    67	      onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => {
    68	        editor.update(() => {
    69	          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
    70	          if (node) node.setImages(images)
    71	        })
    72	      },
    73	      onLayoutChange: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => {
    74	        editor.update(() => {
    75	          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
    76	          if (node) node.setLayout(layout)
    77	        })
    78	      },
    79	    }
    80	    return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
    81	  }
    82	}
    83	
    84	export function $createGalleryEditNode(
    85	  payload: GalleryNodePayload,
    86	): GalleryEditNode {
    87	  return new GalleryEditNode(payload)
    88	}
    89	
    90	export function $isGalleryEditNode(
    91	  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    92	): node is GalleryEditNode {
    93	  return node instanceof GalleryEditNode
    94	}
```
</details></tool-use>

    10	import { allNodes } from '../config'

    16	import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17	import type { RichRendererProps } from '../types'
    18	import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    19	
    20	function NestedLexicalRenderer({
    21	  state,
    22	  nodes: nodeClasses,
    23	}: {
    24	  state: SerializedEditorState
    25	  nodes: typeof allNodes
    26	}) {
    27	  const nestedConfig = {
    28	    namespace: 'NestedRenderer',
    29	    theme: editorTheme,
    30	    nodes: nodeClasses,
    31	    editable: false,
    32	    editorState: JSON.stringify(state),
    33	    onError: (error: Error) => {
    34	      console.error('[NestedRenderer]', error)
    35	    },
    36	  }
    37	
    38	  return (
    39	    <LexicalComposer initialConfig={nestedConfig}>
    40	      <RichTextPlugin
    41	        contentEditable={
    42	          <ContentEditable
    43	            className="rich-nested-content"
    44	            style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    45	            aria-placeholder=""
    46	            placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    47	          />
    48	        }
    49	        ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    50	      />
    51	    </LexicalComposer>
    52	  )
    53	}
    54	
    55	export function RichRenderer({
    56	  value,
    57	  variant = 'article',
    58	  theme = 'light',
    59	  className,
    60	  style,
    61	  as: Component = 'div',
    62	  rendererConfig,
    63	  extraNodes,
    64	}: RichRendererProps) {
    65	  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
    66	
    67	  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    68	
    69	  const initialConfig = {
    70	    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    71	    theme: editorTheme,
    72	    nodes,
    73	    editable: false,
    74	    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    75	    onError: (error: Error) => {
    76	      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
    77	    },
    78	  }
    79	
    80	  const renderNestedContent = useCallback(
    81	    (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
    82	      return <NestedLexicalRenderer state={state} nodes={nodes} />
    83	    },
    84	    [nodes],
    85	  )
    86	
    87	  return (
    88	    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
    89	      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    90	        <RendererConfigProvider
    91	          config={rendererConfig}
    92	          mode="renderer"
    93	          variant={variant}
    94	        >
    95	          <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
    96	            <Component
    97	              className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)}
    98	              style={style}
    99	              data-theme={theme}
   100	            >
   101	              <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
   102	                <FootnotePlugin>
   103	                  <RichTextPlugin
   104	                    contentEditable={
   105	                      <ContentEditable
   106	                        className="rich-content__body"
   107	                        style={{ outline: 'none' }}
   108	                        aria-placeholder=""
   109	                        placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
   110	                      />
   111	                    }
   112	                    ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
   113	                  />
   114	                  <HeadingAnchorPlugin />
   115	                </FootnotePlugin>
   116	              </LexicalComposer>
   117	            </Component>
   118	          </NestedContentRendererProvider>
   119	        </RendererConfigProvider>
   120	      </ColorSchemeProvider>
   121	    </PortalThemeProvider>
   122	  )
   123	}

Output:
     1	import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     2	
     3	export interface FootnoteData {
     4	  definitions: Record<string, string>
     5	  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
     6	}
     7	
     8	export function preprocessFootnotes(state: SerializedEditorState): FootnoteData {
     9	  const definitions: Record<string, string> = {}
    10	  const seen = new Set<string>()
    11	  const displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    12	  let counter = 1
    13	
    14	  function walk(node: any): void {
    15	    if (node.type === 'footnote' && node.identifier) {
    16	      const id = node.identifier
    17	      if (!seen.has(id)) {
    18	        seen.add(id)
    19	        displayNumberMap[id] = counter++
    20	      }
    21	    }
    22	    if (node.type === 'footnote-section' && node.definitions) {
    23	      Object.assign(definitions, node.definitions)
    24	    }
    25	    if (node.children) {
    26	      for (const child of node.children) walk(child)
    27	    }
    28	    if (node.root) walk(node.root)
    29	    if (node.content && typeof node.content === 'object' && node.content.root) {
    30	      walk(node.content)
    31	    }
    32	    if (node.cells && Array.isArray(node.cells)) {
    33	      for (const cell of node.cells) {
    34	        if (cell && cell.root) walk(cell)
    35	      }
    36	    }
    37	  }
    38	
    39	  walk(state)
    40	
    41	  for (const id of seen) {
    42	    if (!(id in definitions)) {
    43	      definitions[id] = ''
    44	    }
    45	  }
    46	
    47	  return { definitions, displayNumberMap }
    48	}
```
</details></tool-use>

    14	export interface EnhancedLinkCardProps extends LinkCardRendererProps {

    22	function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
    23	  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)
    24	
    25	  return (
    26	    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
    27	      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (

    29	      ) : (
    30	        <Globe aria-hidden="true" />
    31	      )}
    32	    </span>
    33	  )
    34	}
    35	
    36	function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
    37	  if (!classNames) return ''
    38	  return classNames
    39	    .split(/\s+/)
    40	    .filter(Boolean)
    41	    .map((cls) =>
    42	      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
    43	        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
    44	        : cls,
    45	    )
    46	    .join(' ')
    47	}

    49	export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (

     7	export const INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND = createCommand<string>('INSERT_TLDRAW')
     8	
     9	export function TldrawPlugin() {

    10	
    11	export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {

     4	import { useFootnoteDefinitions } from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'

     6	export interface FootnoteSectionRendererProps {
     7	  definitions: Record<string, string>
     8	  nodeKey: string
     9	}
    10	
    11	export function FootnoteSectionRenderer({
    12	  definitions,
    13	}: FootnoteSectionRendererProps) {
    14	  const { displayNumberMap } = useFootnoteDefinitions()
    15	
    16	  const sortedEntries = Object.entries(definitions).sort(
    17	    ([a], [b]) => (displayNumberMap[a] ?? 0) - (displayNumberMap[b] ?? 0),
    18	  )
    19	
    20	  if (sortedEntries.length === 0) return null
    21	
    22	  return (
    23	    <div className="rich-footnote-section-content" role="doc-endnotes">
    24	      <hr className="rich-footnote-section-divider" />
    25	      <ol className="rich-footnote-section-list">
    26	        {sortedEntries.map(([identifier, content]) => {
    27	          const displayNum = displayNumberMap[identifier] ?? identifier
    28	          return (
    29	            <FootnoteSectionItem
    30	              key={identifier}
    31	              identifier={identifier}
    32	              content={content}
    33	              displayNum={displayNum}
    34	            />
    35	          )
    36	        })}
    37	      </ol>
    38	    </div>
    39	  )
    40	}
    41	
    42	function FootnoteSectionItem({
    43	  identifier,
    44	  content,
    45	  displayNum,
    46	}: {
    47	  identifier: string
    48	  content: string
    49	  displayNum: number | string
    50	}) {
    51	  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    52	  const refId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    53	
    54	  const handleBackClick = useCallback(
    55	    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    56	      e.preventDefault()
    57	      const refElement = document.getElementById(refId)
    58	      if (!refElement) return
    59	      refElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    60	      refElement.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    61	      window.setTimeout(() => {
    62	        refElement.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    63	      }, 1200)
    64	    },
    65	    [refId],
    66	  )
    67	
    68	  return (
    69	    <li
    70	      id={targetId}
    71	      className="rich-footnote-section-item"
    72	      value={typeof displayNum === 'number' ? displayNum : undefined}
    73	    >
    74	      <span className="rich-footnote-section-item-content">{content}</span>
    75	      <a
    76	        href={`#${refId}`}
    77	        onClick={handleBackClick}
    78	        className="rich-footnote-back-ref"
    79	        role="doc-backlink"
    80	        aria-label={`Back to reference ${displayNum}`}
    81	      >
    82	        ↩
    83	      </a>
    84	    </li>
    85	  )
    86	}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-25 15:32:54Z)**_

</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-25 15:33:11Z)**_

**Findings**
1. `[CRITICAL]` 你说的主因成立，而且影响范围是“所有 DecoratorNode”，不只是 Alert/Tldraw。当前 SSR 仍依赖 `getDecorators()`，headless 下这里为空，导致整批节点丢失。证据见 [RichSSRRenderer.tsx:69](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx:69), [RichSSRRenderer.tsx:76](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx:76), [RichSSRRenderer.tsx:92](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx:92), [RichSSRRenderer.tsx:98](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx:98)。  
会同类“不渲染”的包括：`Image/Mermaid/Video/LinkCard/KaTeX/Mention/CodeBlock/Footnote/FootnoteSection/Alert/Banner/Grid`，以及 `embed/gallery/tldraw/code-snippet`（后四者来自 Shiro extraNodes，见 [ssr.tsx:13](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx:13)）。

2. `[CRITICAL]` A1 里“只要有 `decorate` 就直接 return”的写法会引入新回归：`horizontalrule` 可能被吞掉。`HorizontalRuleNode` 是 DecoratorNode（见 [config.ts:2](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts:2), [config.ts:32](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts:32)），Lexical 实现里该类未自定义 `decorate`（见 [LexicalExtension.dev.js:1183](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/node_modules/@lexical/extension/LexicalExtension.dev.js:1183)），而你当前 SSR 的 `<hr>` 是靠 builtin 分支补出来的（[renderBuiltinNode.tsx:71](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx:71)）。  
建议：Decorator 分支里 `decorate()` 返回 `null/undefined` 时，继续走 builtin fallback，不要直接终止。

3. `[HIGH]` 还有两个非 Decorator 的自定义 ElementNode 会“静默消失”：`details` 和 `spoiler`。它们在节点层存在（[DetailsNode.ts:47](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/DetailsNode.ts:47), [SpoilerNode.ts:11](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/SpoilerNode.ts:11), [config.ts:22](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts:22), [config.ts:51](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts:51)），但 SSR builtin switch 没有 case，直接落到 `default: null`（[renderBuiltinNode.tsx:94](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx:94)）。

4. `[MEDIUM]` 如果按 B3 删除 `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/ssr`，当前 demo 会直接编译失败，因为还在引用该入口（[EditorPage.tsx:3](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/EditorPage.tsx:3), [PresetsPage.tsx:3](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/PresetsPage.tsx:3)）。你的清单里没覆盖这两处迁移。

5. `[MEDIUM]` SSR 样式包里漏了 embed 样式：`style-ssr.css` 没有 `@haklex/rich-ext-embed/style.css`（[style-ssr.css:1](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/style-ssr.css:1)），但默认 SSR extraNodes 包含 embed（[ssr.tsx:15](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx:15)）。这会导致“能渲染但像没渲染”的视觉退化。

**Open Questions**
1. A1 最终策略是否定为：`DecoratorNode -> try decorate -> 若 null 再 fallback builtin`？这是避免 `horizontalrule` 回归的关键。
2. B 阶段是否要保留一版兼容别名（`@haklex/rich-editor/renderer`、`@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/ssr`）给迁移窗口？否则一次性 break 会比较硬。

**结论**
你的方向是对的，核心修复点也抓准了；但还需要补上 `horizontalrule` fallback、`details/spoiler` 映射、以及 demo/样式迁移遗漏，这三块不补会继续出现“节点不渲染或看起来没渲染”。

_**User (2026-02-25 15:36:25Z)**_

review updated: 修复 SSR 渲染器 + 统一为唯一 RichRenderer

 Context

 SSR 渲染器未复刻 Readonly Renderer 效果。根因：editor.getDecorators() 在 headless 模式下返回空 {}，所有 DecoratorNode 丢失。此外
 DetailsNode/SpoilerNode（ElementNode）无 builtin case 亦消失。

 ---
 Part A：修复 SSR 引擎渲染

 A1：修复 DecoratorNode 渲染

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx

 根因：editor.getDecorators() 在 headless 下返回 {}。

 修复：移除 getDecorators() 调用，在 renderTree 中对 DecoratorNode 直接调用 node.decorate(editor, editor._config)。

 关键：decorate() 返回 null/undefined 时（如 HorizontalRuleNode），继续 fallthrough 到 builtin 分支。

 function renderTree(
   node: any,
   editor: LexicalEditor,
   headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
   key: string,
 ): ReactNode {
   const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key

   // DecoratorNode: 调用 decorate()，返回 null 则 fallthrough
   if (typeof node.decorate === 'function') {
     try {
       const decoration = node.decorate(editor, editor._config)
       if (decoration != null) return decoration
     } catch { /* fallthrough to builtin */ }
   }

   const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}

   if (serialized.type === 'text') {
     return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
   }

   let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
   if (node.getChildren) {
     const childNodes = node.getChildren()
     if (childNodes.length > 0) {
       children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
         renderTree(child, editor, headingSlugs, `${nodeKey}-${i}`),
       )
     }
   }

   return renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs)
 }

 变更清单：
 - 移除 decorations 参数和 editor.getDecorators() 调用
 - renderTree 新增 editor 参数（替代 decorations）
 - DecoratorNode 分支：decorate() 返回非 null → use，否则 fallthrough
 - renderEditorToReact 内传 editor 给 renderTree
 - renderNestedContent 同步更新

 影响节点（全部 DecoratorNode 均通过此路径渲染）：
 - Alert、Banner、Grid → 各自的 StaticDecorator
 - Image、Video、Mermaid、CodeBlock、LinkCard、KaTeX、Mention、Footnote、FootnoteSection → RendererWrapper
 - HorizontalRuleNode → decorate() 返回 null → fallthrough → renderBuiltinNode 的 <hr> 分支
 - Tldraw、Gallery、Embed、CodeSnippet → 各自的 static decorate

 A2：补全 ElementNode — details + spoiler

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx

 这两个是自定义 ElementNode（非 DecoratorNode），当前 switch 无 case，命中 default: null。

 新增 case：

 case 'details': {
   // DetailsNode: <details class="rich-details"> + <summary> + <div class="rich-details-content">children</div>
   const summary = node.summary || ''
   return (
     <details key={key} className="rich-details" open={node.open || undefined}>
       <summary className="rich-details-summary">
         <span className="rich-details-summary-text">{summary}</span>
         <span className="rich-details-chevron">
           <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
             <path d="M6 8L10 12L14 8" />
           </svg>
         </span>
       </summary>
       <div className="rich-details-content">{children}</div>
     </details>
   )
 }

 case 'spoiler':
   // SpoilerNode: inline <span class="rich-spoiler">
   return <span key={key} className="rich-spoiler" role="button" tabIndex={0}>{children}</span>

 注：SSR 下 spoiler 的 click-to-reveal 行为需浏览器端 JS hydrate，静态渲染仅输出 rich-spoiler class（CSS 控制遮罩）。

 A3：补全嵌套 listitem class

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx

 Lexical 序列化中嵌套 listitem 不存独立标识。检测方式：children 中包含 list 类型节点。但因 renderBuiltinNode 接收的是已渲染的
 ReactNode[] children（非序列化节点），需在 renderTree 层传递额外信息。

 实际方案：在 renderBuiltinNode 中检查 serialized node 的 children 是否包含 list 类型子节点：

 case 'listitem': {
   const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
   const hasNestedList = node.children?.some(
     (c: any) => c.type === 'list'
   )
   let cls: string
   if (hasNestedList) {
     cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
   } else if (isChecklist) {
     cls = node.checked
       ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked'
       : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   } else {
     cls = 'rich-list-item'
   }
   return <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>{children}</li>
 }

 注：renderBuiltinNode 已接收 node（序列化 JSON），其 children 字段可用于此检测。

 A4：补全 embed 样式

 文件：packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/style-ssr.css

 缺少 embed 样式，但默认 SSR extraNodes 包含 embedNodes。

 @import '@haklex/rich-editor/style.css';
 @import '@haklex/rich-renderers/style.css';
 @import '@haklex/rich-renderer-katex/style.css';
 @import '@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet/style.css';
 @import '@haklex/rich-ext-embed/style.css';       /* ← 新增 */

     2	import { $getRoot, $nodesOfType, $parseSerializedNode } from 'lexical'
     3	import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     4	
     5	import { FootnoteDefinitionsProvider } from '../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     6	import { FootnoteNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteNode'
     7	import { FootnoteSectionNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteSectionNode'
     8	
     9	export function FootnotePlugin({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {
    10	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    11	  const [definitions, setDefinitions] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
    12	  const [displayNumberMap, setDisplayNumberMap] = useState<
    13	    Record<string, number>
    14	  >({})
    15	  const pendingUpdateRef = useRef(false)
    16	
    17	  useEffect(() => {
    18	    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    19	      editorState.read(() => {
    20	        const footnoteNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)
    21	        const seen = new Set<string>()
    22	        const numberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    23	        let counter = 1
    24	        for (const node of footnoteNodes) {
    25	          const id = node.getIdentifier()
    26	          if (!seen.has(id)) {
    27	            seen.add(id)
    28	            numberMap[id] = counter++
    29	          }
    30	        }
    31	        setDisplayNumberMap(numberMap)
    32	
    33	        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    34	
    35	        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    36	          setDefinitions(sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions())
    37	        } else {
    38	          setDefinitions({})
    39	        }
    40	
    41	        if (!editor.isEditable() || pendingUpdateRef.current) return
    42	
    43	        if (footnoteNodes.length === 0 && sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    44	          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    45	          queueMicrotask(() => {
    46	            editor.update(() => {
    47	              const sections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    48	              for (const s of sections) s.remove()
    49	            })
    50	            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    51	          })
    52	          return
    53	        }
    54	
    55	        if (footnoteNodes.length > 0 && sectionNodes.length === 0) {
    56	          const seenSnapshot = [...seen]
    57	          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    58	          queueMicrotask(() => {
    59	            editor.update(() => {
    60	              const root = $getRoot()
    61	              const defs: Record<string, string> = {}
    62	              for (const id of seenSnapshot) {
    63	                defs[id] = ''
    64	              }
    65	              const section = $parseSerializedNode({
    66	                type: 'footnote-section',
    67	                definitions: defs,
    68	                version: 1,
    69	              })
    70	              root.append(section)
    71	            })
    72	            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    73	          })
    74	        } else if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    75	          const existingDefs = sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions()
    76	          const missingIds = [...seen].filter((id) => !(id in existingDefs))
    77	          const orphanIds = Object.keys(existingDefs).filter(
    78	            (id) => !seen.has(id),
    79	          )
    80	          if (missingIds.length > 0 || orphanIds.length > 0) {
    81	            pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    82	            queueMicrotask(() => {
    83	              editor.update(() => {
    84	                const freshSections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    85	                if (freshSections.length > 0) {
    86	                  for (const id of missingIds) {
    87	                    freshSections[0].setDefinition(id, '')
    88	                  }
    89	                  for (const id of orphanIds) {
    90	                    freshSections[0].removeDefinition(id)
    91	                  }
    92	                }
    93	              })
    94	              pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    95	            })
    96	          }
    97	        }
    98	      })
    99	    })
   100	  }, [editor])
   101

   109	  )

    22	interface DiffRow {
    23	  left: DiffHunk | null
    24	  right: DiffHunk | null
    25	}
    26	
    27	function buildRows(hunks: DiffHunk[]): DiffRow[] {
    28	  const rows: DiffRow[] = []
    29	  let i = 0
    30	  while (i < hunks.length) {
    31	    const hunk = hunks[i]
    32	    if (hunk.type === 'equal') {
    33	      rows.push({ left: hunk, right: hunk })
    34	      i++
    35	    } else {
    36	      // Collect consecutive non-equal hunks into deletes/inserts
    37	      const deletes: DiffHunk[] = []
    38	      const inserts: DiffHunk[] = []
    39	      while (i < hunks.length && hunks[i].type !== 'equal') {
    40	        if (hunks[i].type === 'delete') deletes.push(hunks[i])
    41	        else inserts.push(hunks[i])
    42	        i++
    43	      }
    44	      // Pair by position — surplus hunks render with empty opposite side
    45	      const maxLen = Math.max(deletes.length, inserts.length)
    46	      for (let k = 0; k < maxLen; k++) {
    47	        rows.push({
    48	          left: k < deletes.length ? deletes[k] : null,
    49	          right: k < inserts.length ? inserts[k] : null,
    50	        })
    51	      }
    52	    }
    53	  }
    54	  return rows
    55	}
    56

    63	      indent: 0,

    65	      version: 1,

    67	  }

    18	
    19	type Page = 'editor' | 'nodes' | 'presets' | 'diff'
    20	type ThemeMode = 'system' | 'light' | 'dark'
    21	
    22	function useSystemColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    23	  const [scheme, setScheme] = useState<ColorScheme>(() =>
    24	    window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches
    25	      ? 'dark'
    26	      : 'light',
    27	  )
    28	
    29	  useEffect(() => {
    30	    const mq = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
    31	    const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) =>
    32	      setScheme(e.matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
    33	    mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
    34	    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
    35	  }, [])
    36	
    37	  return scheme
    38	}
    39	
    40	export function App() {
    41	  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState<Page>(() => {
    42	    const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    43	    return hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    44	      ? hash
    45	      : 'editor'
    46	  })
    47	  const [themeMode, setThemeMode] = useState<ThemeMode>('system')
    48	  const systemScheme = useSystemColorScheme()
    49	
    50	  const resolved: ColorScheme =
    51	    themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode
    52	
    53	  const dataTheme = useMemo(
    54	    () => (themeMode === 'system' ? systemScheme : themeMode),
    55	    [systemScheme, themeMode],
    56	  )
    57	
    58	  const cycleTheme = useCallback(() => {
    59	    setThemeMode((m) => {
    60	      if (m === 'system') return 'light'
    61	      if (m === 'light') return 'dark'
    62	      return 'system'
    63	    })
    64	  }, [])
    65	
    66	  const themeLabel =
    67	    themeMode === 'system' ? 'System' : themeMode === 'light' ? 'Light' : 'Dark'
    68	  const ThemeIcon =
    69	    themeMode === 'system' ? Monitor : themeMode === 'light' ? Sun : Moon
    70	
    71	  useEffect(() => {
    72	    const handleHashChange = () => {
    73	      const hash = window.location.hash.slice(1) as Page
    74	      const validPage =
    75	        hash === 'nodes' || hash === 'presets' || hash === 'diff'
    76	          ? hash
    77	          : 'editor'
    78	      setCurrentPage(validPage)
    79	    }
    80	
    81	    window.addEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    82	    return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handleHashChange)
    83	  }, [])
    84	
    85	  const navigate = (page: Page) => {
    86	    window.location.hash = page
    87	  }
    88	
    89	  const mockSaveSnapshot = useCallback(async (snapshot: object) => {
    90	    const json = JSON.stringify(snapshot)
    91	    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' })
    92	    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
    93	    console.log('[TldrawConfig] saveSnapshot → blob URL:', url)
    94	    return url
    95	  }, [])
    96	
    97	  return (
    98	    <ThemeContext value={resolved}>
    99	      <TldrawConfigProvider saveSnapshot={mockSaveSnapshot}>
   100	        <DialogStackProvider>
   101	          <div className="app" data-theme={dataTheme}>
   102	            <header className="app-header">
   103	              <div className="app-header-content">
   104	                <div>
   105	                  <h1 className="app-title">@haklex/rich-editor</h1>
   106	                  <p className="app-subtitle">
   107	                    Lexical-based rich text editor & renderer
   108	                  </p>
   109	                </div>

   115	                        : 'nav-tab'

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-25 15:42:53Z)**_

不是“完全反了”，但确实**收得太像 RSC 约束**了。

你真正目标是 SSR（`renderToString` 有完整 HTML），那当前正确主线是：

1. 修 `getDecorators()` 为空的问题，改成 `node.decorate(...)`，并保留 `null/undefined -> builtin fallback`。  
2. 补 `details` / `spoiler` / nested listitem class。  
3. 补 SSR 样式缺口（embed）。

这些做完，SSR 可用性就到位了。

可以放宽、不必现在做成破坏性大改的：

1. 不必为了 SSR 强制“无 hook / 近 RSC 纯组件”。  
2. 不必立即删 `@haklex/rich-editor` 里的旧 `RichRenderer` 入口。  
3. 包改名与“唯一 RichRenderer”可以放第二阶段，先做兼容别名再迁移。

所以结论：**方向不是错，是目标对了但约束级别过高**。先把 SSR 渲染正确性修完，再做统一与重命名。

按 **SSR-only** 处理即可，你的目标没问题，之前只是约束收得太像 RSC 了。

建议把 plan 收敛为：

1. **删掉所有 RSC 约束**  
`no hooks`、`ShiroRenderer/useMemo` 这类限制都不需要。

2. **SSR 引擎保持严格**  
只约束 `packages/rich-ssr-renderer`：render 路径不能依赖浏览器 API，不能走 `getDecorators()`，改 `node.decorate(...) + null/undefined fallback builtin`。

3. **Static renderer 用 Isomorphic 标准**  
允许 `useEffect`/callback 里用浏览器 API；只要求“首帧有意义 HTML + 不导入 edit-only UI 包”。

4. **先修正确性，再做统一改名**  
先完成 A（Decorator 渲染、details/spoiler、nested list、embed 样式），再做 B（包改名/唯一入口）。

所以结论：不是方向反了，是“SSR 目标正确，但约束级别过高（误加了 RSC 标准）”。

_**User (2026-02-25 15:44:57Z)**_

review updated: 修复 SSR 渲染器 + 统一为唯一 RichRenderer

 约束：无 RSC 要求。hooks 可用。SSR 引擎 render 路径不依赖浏览器 API。Static renderer 用 Isomorphic 标准（useEffect/callback
 里可用浏览器 API，首帧有意义 HTML，不导入 edit-UI 包）。先 A 后 B。

 Context

 SSR 渲染器未复刻 Readonly Renderer 效果。根因：editor.getDecorators() 在 headless 模式下返回空 {}，所有 DecoratorNode 丢失。此外
 DetailsNode/SpoilerNode（ElementNode）无 builtin case 亦消失。

 ---
 Part A：修复 SSR 引擎渲染

 A1：修复 DecoratorNode 渲染

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/RichSSRRenderer.tsx

 根因：editor.getDecorators() 在 headless 下返回 {}。

 修复：移除 getDecorators() 调用，在 renderTree 中对 DecoratorNode 直接调用 node.decorate(editor, editor._config)。

 关键：decorate() 返回 null/undefined 时（如 HorizontalRuleNode），继续 fallthrough 到 builtin 分支。

 function renderTree(
   node: any,
   editor: LexicalEditor,
   headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
   key: string,
 ): ReactNode {
   const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key

   // DecoratorNode: 调用 decorate()，返回 null 则 fallthrough
   if (typeof node.decorate === 'function') {
     try {
       const decoration = node.decorate(editor, editor._config)
       if (decoration != null) return decoration
     } catch { /* fallthrough to builtin */ }
   }

   const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}

   if (serialized.type === 'text') {
     return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
   }

   let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
   if (node.getChildren) {
     const childNodes = node.getChildren()
     if (childNodes.length > 0) {
       children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
         renderTree(child, editor, headingSlugs, `${nodeKey}-${i}`),
       )
     }
   }

   return renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs)
 }

 变更清单：
 - 移除 decorations 参数和 editor.getDecorators() 调用
 - renderTree 新增 editor 参数（替代 decorations）
 - DecoratorNode 分支：decorate() 返回非 null → use，否则 fallthrough
 - renderEditorToReact 内传 editor 给 renderTree
 - renderNestedContent 同步更新

 影响节点（全部 DecoratorNode 均通过此路径渲染）：
 - Alert、Banner、Grid → 各自的 StaticDecorator
 - Image、Video、Mermaid、CodeBlock、LinkCard、KaTeX、Mention、Footnote、FootnoteSection → RendererWrapper
 - HorizontalRuleNode → decorate() 返回 null → fallthrough → renderBuiltinNode 的 <hr> 分支
 - Tldraw、Gallery、Embed、CodeSnippet → 各自的 static decorate

 A2：补全 ElementNode — details + spoiler

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx

 这两个是自定义 ElementNode（非 DecoratorNode），当前 switch 无 case，命中 default: null。

 新增 case：

 case 'details': {
   // DetailsNode: <details class="rich-details"> + <summary> + <div class="rich-details-content">children</div>
   const summary = node.summary || ''
   return (
     <details key={key} className="rich-details" open={node.open || undefined}>
       <summary className="rich-details-summary">
         <span className="rich-details-summary-text">{summary}</span>
         <span className="rich-details-chevron">
           <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round">
             <path d="M6 8L10 12L14 8" />
           </svg>
         </span>
       </summary>
       <div className="rich-details-content">{children}</div>
     </details>
   )
 }

 case 'spoiler':
   // SpoilerNode: inline <span class="rich-spoiler">
   return <span key={key} className="rich-spoiler" role="button" tabIndex={0}>{children}</span>

 注：SSR 下 spoiler 的 click-to-reveal 行为需浏览器端 JS hydrate，静态渲染仅输出 rich-spoiler class（CSS 控制遮罩）。

 A3：补全嵌套 listitem class

 文件：packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx

 Lexical 序列化中嵌套 listitem 不存独立标识。检测方式：children 中包含 list 类型节点。但因 renderBuiltinNode 接收的是已渲染的
 ReactNode[] children（非序列化节点），需在 renderTree 层传递额外信息。

 实际方案：在 renderBuiltinNode 中检查 serialized node 的 children 是否包含 list 类型子节点：

 case 'listitem': {
   const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
   const hasNestedList = node.children?.some(
     (c: any) => c.type === 'list'
   )
   let cls: string
   if (hasNestedList) {
     cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
   } else if (isChecklist) {
     cls = node.checked
       ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked'
       : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   } else {
     cls = 'rich-list-item'
   }
   return <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>{children}</li>
 }

 注：renderBuiltinNode 已接收 node（序列化 JSON），其 children 字段可用于此检测。

 A4：补全 embed 样式

 文件：packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/style-ssr.css

 缺少 embed 样式，但默认 SSR extraNodes 包含 embedNodes。

 ---
 验证

 pnpm install
 pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderer build
 pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build
 pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-diff build
 pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build

 # Demo 视觉验证
 pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
 # Readonly 和 SSR 模式逐一对比：
 # ✓ Alert (TIP/WARNING/CALLOUT) — 容器+图标+嵌套内容
 # ✓ Banner — 容器+嵌套内容
 # ✓ Grid — 多列布局
 # ✓ Image — thumbhash+caption
 # ✓ Mermaid — fallback pre/code
 # ✓ CodeBlock — Shiki 高亮
 # ✓ LinkCard
 # ✓ KaTeX 公式
 # ✓ Tldraw — SSR placeholder
 # ✓ Footnote 引用+section
 # ✓ HorizontalRule — <hr> 正常渲染
 # ✓ Details — <details> 折叠块
 # ✓ Spoiler — 遮罩文字
 # ✓ Table — 表格结构
 # ✓ Checklist — 勾选样式
 # ✓ Embed — 嵌入块+样式
 # ✓ Heading anchor 链接

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-25 15:47:20Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Summarizing prioritized review findings**
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-25 15:47:27Z)**_

**Findings**
1. `HIGH` Demo 样式迁移少了一处，按你的 B3 会直接报错。  
[App.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor-demo/src/App.tsx:3) 现在还在引 `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style-ssr.css`，如果改名为 `style-renderer.css`，这里必须同步改。

2. `HIGH` `style-renderer.css` 的产物路径在发布侧可能仍然是坏的。  
你计划删 `ssr` entry（见 [vite.config.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/vite.config.ts:8)），但当前入口里没有任何文件 import `style-ssr.css`/`style-renderer.css`（[renderer.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/renderer.tsx:1), [ssr.tsx](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx:1)）。  
同时 publishConfig 又指向单独 css 文件（[package.json](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-kit-shiro/package.json:81)）。要么把 css 挂到某个 entry 里产出，要么发布时直接导出 source css。

3. `MEDIUM` A1 里直接用 `editor._config` 可用但偏脆弱（私有字段语义）。  
参考 [LexicalEditor.d.ts](<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/node_modules/lexical/LexicalEditor.d.ts:347)。建议在 SSR 引擎内自己构造并复用 `EditorConfig`（至少 `theme`/`namespace`），避免后续 lexical 升级被内部字段变动击穿。

**结论**
这版方向已经对了，不是反方向。  
A 部分（decorate 直调 + null fallthrough + details/spoiler + nested list + embed css）是正确主线；补上上面 3 个点就可以进入实施。
